name: Bulbasaur
dexEntry: The seed on its back is filled with nutrients. The seed grows steadily larger as its body grows.

name: Ivysaur
dexEntry: Exposure to sunlight adds to its strength. Sunlight also makes the bud on its back grow larger.

name: Venusaur
dexEntry: By spreading the broad petals of its flower and catching the sun’s rays, it fills its body with power.

name: Charmander
dexEntry: The flame on its tail shows the strength of its life force. If it is weak, the flame also burns weakly.

name: Charmeleon
dexEntry: It is very hotheaded by nature, so it constantly seeks opponents. It calms down only when it wins.

name: Charizard
dexEntry: If CHARIZARD becomes furious, the flame at the tip of its tail flares up in a light blue shade.

name: Squirtle
dexEntry: The shell is soft when it is born. It soon becomes so resilient, prodding fingers will bounce off it.

name: Wartortle
dexEntry: It is a well-established symbol of longevity. If its shell has algae on it, that WARTORTLE is very old.

name: Blastoise
dexEntry: It deliberately makes itself heavy so it can withstand the recoil of the water jets it fires.

name: Caterpie
dexEntry: For protection, it releases a horrible stench from the antennae on its head to drive away enemies.

name: Metapod
dexEntry: Inside the shell, it is soft and weak as it prepares to evolve. It stays motionless in the shell.

name: Butterfree
dexEntry: It collects honey every day. It rubs honey onto the hairs on its legs to carry it back to its nest.

name: Weedle
dexEntry: Its poison stinger is very powerful. Its bright-colored body is intended to warn off its enemies.

name: Kakuna
dexEntry: Although it is a cocoon, it can move a little. It can extend its poison barb if it is attacked.

name: Beedrill
dexEntry: It can take down any opponent with its powerful poison stingers. It sometimes attacks in swarms.

name: Pidgey
dexEntry: It usually hides in tall grass. Because it dislikes fighting, it protects itself by kicking up sand.

name: Pidgeotto
dexEntry: It has outstanding vision. However high it flies, it is able to distinguish the movements of its prey.

name: Pidgeot
dexEntry: Its well-developed chest muscles make it strong enough to whip up a gusty windstorm with just a few flaps.

name: Rattata
dexEntry: It eats anything. Wherever food is available, it will settle down and produce offspring continuously.

name: Raticate
dexEntry: Gnaws on anything with its tough fangs. It can even topple concrete buildings by gnawing on them.

name: Spearow
dexEntry: It flaps its short wings to flush out insects from tall grass. It then plucks them with its stubby beak.

name: Fearow
dexEntry: It shoots itself suddenly high into the sky, then plummets down in one fell swoop to strike its prey.

name: Ekans
dexEntry: It can freely detach its jaw to swallow large prey whole. It can become too heavy to move, however.

name: Arbok
dexEntry: Transfixing prey with the face-like pattern on its belly, it binds and poisons the frightened victim.

name: Pikachu
dexEntry: This intelligent Pokémon roasts hard berries with electricity to make them tender enough to eat.

name: Raichu
dexEntry: When its electricity builds, its muscles are stimulated, and it becomes more aggressive than usual.

name: Sandshrew
dexEntry: If it fell from a great height, this Pokémon could save itself by rolling into a ball and bouncing.

name: Sandslash
dexEntry: In an attempt to hide itself, it will run around at top speed to kick up a blinding dust storm.

name: Nidoran♀
dexEntry: The poison hidden in its small horn is extremely potent. Even a tiny scratch can have fatal results.

name: Nidorina
dexEntry: When feeding its young, it first chews the food into a paste, then spits it out for the offspring.

name: Nidoqueen
dexEntry: Its body is covered with needle-like scales. It never shows signs of shrinking from any attack.

name: Nidoran♂
dexEntry: It is small, but its horn is filled with poison. It charges then stabs with the horn to inject poison.

name: Nidorino
dexEntry: It raises its big ears to check its surroundings. If it senses anything, it attacks immediately.

name: Nidoking
dexEntry: It swings its big tail around during battle. If its foe flinches, it will charge with its sturdy body.

name: Clefairy
dexEntry: The moonlight that it stores in the wings on its back apparently gives it the ability to float in midair.

name: Clefable
dexEntry: With its acute hearing, it can pick up sounds from far away. It usually hides in quiet places.

name: Vulpix
dexEntry: As it develops, its single white tail gains color and splits into six. It is quite warm and cuddly.

name: Ninetales
dexEntry: Some legends claim that each of its nine tails has its own unique type of special mystical power.

name: Jigglypuff
dexEntry: If it inflates to sing a lullaby, it can perform longer and cause sure drowsiness in its audience.

name: Wigglytuff
dexEntry: Their fur feels so good that if two of them snuggle together, they won’t want to be separated.

name: Zubat
dexEntry: While flying, it constantly emits ultrasonic waves from its mouth to check its surroundings.

name: Golbat
dexEntry: However hard its victim’s hide may be, it punctures with sharp fangs and gorges itself with blood.

name: Oddish
dexEntry: Awakened by moonlight, it roams actively at night. In the day, it stays quietly underground.

name: Gloom
dexEntry: What appears to be drool is actually sweet honey. It is very sticky and clings stubbornly if touched.

name: Vileplume
dexEntry: It has the world’s largest petals. With every step, the petals shake out heavy clouds of toxic pollen.

name: Paras
dexEntry: It is doused with mushroom spores when it is born. As its body grows, mushrooms sprout from its back.

name: Parasect
dexEntry: It stays mostly in dark, damp places, the preference not of the bug, but of the big mushroom on its back.

name: Venonat
dexEntry: Its eyes also function as radar units. It catches and eats small bugs that hide in darkness.

name: Venomoth
dexEntry: When it attacks, it flaps its large wings violently to scatter its poisonous powder all around.

name: Diglett
dexEntry: Its skin is very thin. If it is exposed to light, its blood heats up, causing it to grow weak.

name: Dugtrio
dexEntry: Its three heads bob separately up and down to loosen the soil nearby, making it easier for it to burrow.

name: Meowth
dexEntry: It is fascinated by round objects. It can’t stop playing with them until it tires and falls asleep.

name: Persian
dexEntry: Many adore it for its sophisticated air. However, it will lash out and scratch for little reason.

name: Psyduck
dexEntry: It has mystical powers but doesn’t recall that it has used them. That is why it always looks puzzled.

name: Golduck
dexEntry: When it swims at full speed using its long, webbed limbs, its forehead somehow begins to glow.

name: Mankey
dexEntry: It is extremely ill-tempered. Groups of them will attack any handy target for no reason.

name: Primeape
dexEntry: If approached while asleep, it may awaken and angrily give chase in a groggy state of semi-sleep.

name: Growlithe
dexEntry: It has a brave and trustworthy nature. It fearlessly stands up to bigger and stronger foes.

name: Arcanine
dexEntry: This legendary Chinese Pokémon is considered magnificent. Many people are enchanted by its grand mane.

name: Poliwag
dexEntry: Because it is inept at walking on its newly grown legs, it always  swims around in water.

name: Poliwhirl
dexEntry: The swirl on its belly subtly undulates. Staring at it may gradually cause drowsiness.

name: Poliwrath
dexEntry: This strong and skilled swimmer is even capable of crossing the Pacific Ocean just by kicking.

name: Abra
dexEntry: It senses impending attacks and teleports away to safety before the actual attacks can strike.

name: Kadabra
dexEntry: It possesses strong spiritual power. The more danger it faces, the stronger its psychic power.

name: Alakazam
dexEntry: Closing both its eyes heightens all its other senses. This enables it to use its abilities to their extremes.

name: Machop
dexEntry: Always brimming with power, it passes time by lifting boulders. Doing so makes it even stronger.

name: Machoke
dexEntry: It always goes at its full power, but this very tough and durable Pokémon never gets tired.

name: Machamp
dexEntry: It quickly swings its four arms to rock its opponents with ceaseless punches and chops from all angles.

name: Bellsprout
dexEntry: Even though its body is extremely skinny, it is blindingly fast when catching its prey.

name: Weepinbell
dexEntry: Even though it is filled with acid, it does not melt because it also oozes a protective fluid.

name: Victreebel
dexEntry: Acid that has dissolved many prey becomes sweeter, making it even more effective at attracting prey.

name: Tentacool
dexEntry: When the tide goes out, dehydrated TENTACOOL remains can be found washed up on the shore.

name: Tentacruel
dexEntry: Its 80 tentacles absorb water and stretch almost endlessly to constrict its prey and enemies.

name: Geodude
dexEntry: Most people may not notice, but a closer look should reveal that there are many GEODUDE around.

name: Graveler
dexEntry: With a free and uncaring nature, it doesn’t mind if pieces break off while it rolls down mountains.

name: Golem
dexEntry: It sheds its skin once a year. The discarded shell immediately hardens and crumbles away.

name: Ponyta
dexEntry: It is a weak runner immediately after birth. It gradually becomes faster by chasing after its parents.

name: Rapidash
dexEntry: At full gallop, its four hooves barely touch the ground because it moves so incredibly fast.

name: Slowpoke
dexEntry: It lazes vacantly near water. If something bites its tail, it won’t even notice for a whole day.

name: Slowbro
dexEntry: If the tail-biting SHELLDER is thrown off in a harsh battle, it reverts to being an ordinary SLOWPOKE.

name: Magnemite
dexEntry: It is attracted by electromagnetic waves. It may approach Trainers if they are using their Pokégear.

name: Magneton
dexEntry: Three MAGNEMITE are linked by a strong magnetic force. Earaches will occur if you get too close.

name: Farfetch’d
dexEntry: If anyone tries to disturb where the essential plant stalks grow, it uses its own stalk to thwart them.

name: Doduo
dexEntry: By alternately raising and lowering its two heads, it balances itself to be more stable while running.

name: Dodrio
dexEntry: It collects data and plans three times as wisely, but it may think too much and fall into a state of immobility.

name: Seel
dexEntry: Although it can’t walk well on land, it is a graceful swimmer. It especially loves being in frigid seas.

name: Dewgong
dexEntry: Its streamlined body has little drag in water. The colder the temperature, the friskier it gets.

name: Grimer
dexEntry: As it moves, it loses bits of its body, from which new GRIMER emerge. This worsens the stench around it.

name: Muk
dexEntry: They love to gather in smelly areas where sludge accumulates, making the stench around them worse.

name: Shellder
dexEntry: It swims facing backward by opening and closing its two-piece shell. It is surprisingly fast.

name: Cloyster
dexEntry: Once it slams its shell shut, it is impossible to open, even by those with superior strength.

name: Gastly
dexEntry: With its gas-like body, it can sneak into any place it desires. However, it can be blown away by wind.

name: Haunter
dexEntry: In total darkness, where nothing is visible, HAUNTER lurks, silently stalking its next victim.

name: Gengar
dexEntry: It steals heat from its surroundings. If you feel a sudden chill, it is certain that a GENGAR appeared.

name: Onix
dexEntry: It twists and squirms through the ground. The thunderous roar of its tunneling echoes a long way.

name: Drowzee
dexEntry: If you think that you had a good dream but you can’t remember it, a DROWZEE has probably eaten it.

name: Hypno
dexEntry: When it is very hungry, it puts humans it meets to sleep, then it feasts on their dreams.

name: Krabby
dexEntry: If it senses danger approaching, it cloaks itself with bubbles from its mouth so it will look bigger.

name: Kingler
dexEntry: It can hardly lift its massive, overgrown pincer. The pincer’s size makes it difficult to aim properly.

name: Voltorb
dexEntry: It rolls to move. If the ground is uneven, a sudden jolt from hitting a bump can cause it to explode.

name: Electrode
dexEntry: It is dangerous. If it has too much electricity and has nothing to do, it amuses itself by exploding.

name: Exeggcute
dexEntry: Their shells are very durable. Even if they crack, they can survive without spilling their contents.

name: Exeggutor
dexEntry: Its three heads think independently. However, they are friendly and never appear to squabble.

name: Cubone
dexEntry: If it is sad or lonely, the skull it wears shakes and emits a plaintive and mournful sound.

name: Marowak
dexEntry: It has been seen pounding boulders with the bone it carries in order to tap out messages to others.

name: Hitmonlee
dexEntry: This amazing Pokémon has an awesome sense of balance. It can kick in succession from any position.

name: Hitmonchan
dexEntry: Its punches slice the air. However, it seems to need a short break after fighting for three minutes.

name: Lickitung
dexEntry: Its tongue has well-developed nerves that run to the very tip, so it can be deftly manipulated.

name: Koffing
dexEntry: Its thin, filmy body is filled with gases that cause constant sniffles, coughs and teary eyes.

name: Weezing
dexEntry: If one of the twin KOFFING inflates, the other one deflates. It constantly mixes its poisonous gases.

name: Rhyhorn
dexEntry: It is inept at turning because of its four short legs. It can only charge and run in one direction.

name: Rhydon
dexEntry: Its rugged hide protects it from even the heat of lava. However, the hide also makes it insensitive.

name: Chansey
dexEntry: It walks carefully to prevent its egg from breaking. However, it is extremely fast at running away.

name: Tangela
dexEntry: The vines that cloak its entire body are always jiggling. They effectively unnerve its foes.

name: Kangaskhan
dexEntry: If it is safe, the young gets out of the belly pouch to play. The adult keeps a close eye on the youngster.

name: Horsea
dexEntry: If attacked by a larger enemy, it quickly swims to safety by adeptly controlling its well-developed dorsal fin.

name: Seadra
dexEntry: An examination of its cells revealed the presence of a gene not found in HORSEA. It became a hot topic.

name: Goldeen
dexEntry: Its dorsal, pectoral and tail fins wave elegantly in water. That is why it is known as the water dancer.

name: Seaking
dexEntry: During spawning season, SEAKING gather from all over, causing rivers to appear a brilliant red.

name: Staryu
dexEntry: At night, the middle of its body slowly flickers with the same rhythm as a human heartbeat.

name: Starmie
dexEntry: The middle section of its body is called the core. It glows in a different color each time it is seen.

name: Mr. Mime
dexEntry: A skilled mime from birth, it gains the ability to create invisible objects as it matures.

name: Scyther
dexEntry: It slashes through grass with its sharp scythes, moving too fast for the human eye to track.

name: Jynx
dexEntry: It rocks its body rhythmically. It appears to alter the rhythm depending on how it is feeling.

name: Electabuzz
dexEntry: Electricity runs across the surface of its body. In darkness, its entire body glows a whitish-blue.

name: Magmar
dexEntry: It dislikes cold places, so it blows scorching flames to make the environment suitable for itself.

name: Pinsir
dexEntry: With its pincer horns, it digs burrows to sleep in at night. In the morning, damp soil clings to its body.

name: Tauros
dexEntry: They fight each other by locking horns. The herd’s protector takes pride in its battle-scarred horns.

name: Magikarp
dexEntry: An underpowered, pathetic Pokémon. It may jump high on rare occasions, but usually not more than seven feet.

name: Gyarados
dexEntry: They say that during past strife, GYARADOS would appear and leave blazing ruins in its wake.

name: Lapras
dexEntry: They have gentle hearts. Because they rarely fight, many have been caught. Their number has dwindled.

name: Ditto
dexEntry: It can transform into anything. When it sleeps, it changes into a stone to avoid being attacked.

name: Eevee
dexEntry: It has the ability to alter the composition of its body to suit its surrounding environment.

name: Vaporeon
dexEntry: When VAPOREON’s fins begin to vibrate, it is a sign that rain will come within a few hours.

name: Jolteon
dexEntry: It concentrates the weak electric charges emitted by its cells and launches wicked lightning bolts.

name: Flareon
dexEntry: It stores some of the air it inhales in its internal flame pouch, which heats it to over 3,000 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Porygon
dexEntry: It is a manmade Pokémon. Since it doesn’t breathe, people are eager to try it in any environment.

name: Omanyte
dexEntry: Revived from an ancient fossil, this Pokémon uses air stored in its shell to sink and rise in water.

name: Omastar
dexEntry: Apparently, it cracked SHELLDER’s shell with its sharp fangs and sucked out the insides.

name: Kabuto
dexEntry: On rare occasions, some have been found as fossils which they became while hiding on the ocean floor.

name: Kabutops
dexEntry: In the water, it tucks in its limbs to become more compact, then it wiggles its shell to swim fast.

name: Aerodactyl
dexEntry: A vicious Pokémon from the distant past, it appears to have flown by spreading its wings and gliding.

name: Snorlax
dexEntry: What sounds like its cry may actually be its snores or the rumblings of its hungry belly.

name: Articuno
dexEntry: The magnificent, seemingly translucent wings of this legendary bird Pokémon are said to be made of ice.

name: Zapdos
dexEntry: This legendary bird Pokémon causes savage thunderstorms by flapping its glittering wings.

name: Moltres
dexEntry: This legendary Pokémon scatters embers with every flap of its wings. It is a thrilling sight to behold.

name: Dratini
dexEntry: It is born large to start with. It repeatedly sheds its skin as it steadily grows longer.

name: Dragonair
dexEntry: They say that if it emits an aura from its whole body, the weather will begin to change instantly.

name: Dragonite
dexEntry: It is said that this Pokémon constantly flies over the immense seas and rescues drowning people.

name: Mewtwo
dexEntry: Because its battle abilities were raised to the ultimate level, it thinks only of defeating its foes.

name: Mew
dexEntry: Apparently, it appears only to those people who are pure of heart and have a strong desire to see it.

name: Chikorita
dexEntry: A sweet aroma gently wafts from the leaf on its head. It is docile and loves to soak up sunrays.

name: Bayleef
dexEntry: The scent of spices comes from around its neck. Somehow, sniffing it makes you want to fight.

name: Meganium
dexEntry: The aroma that rises from its petals contains a substance that calms aggressive feelings.

name: Cyndaquil
dexEntry: It is timid, and always curls itself up in a ball. If attacked, it flares up its back for protection.

name: Quilava
dexEntry: Be careful if it turns its back during battle. It means that it will attack with the fire on its back.

name: Typhlosion
dexEntry: If its rage peaks, it becomes so hot that anything that touches it will instantly go up in flames.

name: Totodile
dexEntry: Its powerful, well-developed jaws are capable of crushing anything. Even its Trainer must be careful.

name: Croconaw
dexEntry: If it loses a fang, a new one grows back in its place. There are always 48 fangs lining its mouth.

name: Feraligatr
dexEntry: When it bites with its massive and powerful jaws, it shakes its head and savagely tears its victim up.

name: Sentret
dexEntry: A very cautious Pokémon, it raises itself up using its tail to get a better view of its surroundings.

name: Furret
dexEntry: It makes a nest to suit its long and skinny body. The nest is impossible for other Pokémon to enter.

name: Hoothoot
dexEntry: It always stands on one foot. It changes feet so fast, the movement can rarely be seen.

name: Noctowl
dexEntry: Its eyes are specially adapted. They concentrate even faint light and enable it to see in the dark.

name: Ledyba
dexEntry: It is very timid. It will be afraid to move if it is alone. But it will be active if it is in a group.

name: Ledian
dexEntry: When the stars flicker in the night sky, it flutters about, scattering a glowing powder.

name: Spinarak
dexEntry: It lies still in the same pose for days in its web, waiting for its unsuspecting prey to wander close.

name: Ariados
dexEntry: It spins string not only from its rear but also from its mouth. It’s hard to tell which end is which.

name: Crobat
dexEntry: It flies so silently through the dark on its four wings that it may not be noticed even when nearby.

name: Chinchou
dexEntry: It shoots positive and negative electricity between the tips of its two antennae and zaps its enemies.

name: Lanturn
dexEntry: The light it emits is so bright that it can illuminate the sea’s surface from a depth of over three miles.

name: Pichu
dexEntry: It is not yet skilled at storing electricity. It may send out a jolt if amused or startled.

name: Cleffa
dexEntry: Because of its unusual, starlike silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor.

name: Igglybuff
dexEntry: It has a very soft body. If it starts to roll, it will bounce all over and be impossible to stop.

name: Togepi
dexEntry: The shell seems to be filled with joy. It is said that it will share good luck when treated kindly.

name: Togetic
dexEntry: They say that it will appear before kindhearted, caring people and shower them with happiness.

name: Natu
dexEntry: Because its wings aren’t yet fully grown, it has to hop to get around. It is always staring at something.

name: Xatu
dexEntry: They say that it stays still and quiet because it is seeing both the past and future at the same time.

name: Mareep
dexEntry: If static electricity builds in its body, its fleece doubles in volume. Touching it will shock you.

name: Flaaffy
dexEntry: As a result of storing too much electricity, it developed patches where even downy wool won’t grow.

name: Ampharos
dexEntry: The tail’s tip shines brightly and can be seen from far away. It acts as a beacon for lost people.

name: Bellossom
dexEntry: BELLOSSOM gather at times and seem to dance. They say that the dance is a ritual to summon the sun.

name: Marill
dexEntry: The tip of its tail, which contains oil that is lighter than water, lets it swim without drowning.

name: Azumarill
dexEntry: By keeping still and listening intently, it can tell what is in even wild, fast-moving rivers.

name: Sudowoodo
dexEntry: Although it always pretends to be a tree, its composition appears more similar to rock than to vegetation.

name: Politoed
dexEntry: If POLIWAG and POLIWHIRL hear its echoing cry, they respond by gathering from far and wide.

name: Hoppip
dexEntry: To keep from being blown away by the wind, they gather in clusters. But they do enjoy gentle breezes.

name: Skiploom
dexEntry: The bloom on top of its head opens and closes as the temperature fluctuates up and down.

name: Jumpluff
dexEntry: Once it catches the wind, it deftly controls its cotton-puff spores-- it can even float around the world.

name: Aipom
dexEntry: Its tail is so powerful that it can use it to grab a tree branch and hold itself up in the air.

name: Sunkern
dexEntry: It may plummet from the sky. If attacked by a SPEAROW, it will violently shake its leaves.

name: Sunflora
dexEntry: It converts sunlight into energy. In the darkness after sunset, it closes its petals and becomes still.

name: Yanma
dexEntry: If it flaps its wings really fast, it can generate shock waves that will shatter windows in the area.

name: Wooper
dexEntry: This Pokémon lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.

name: Quagsire
dexEntry: This carefree Pokémon has an easy-going nature. While swimming, it always bumps into boat hulls.

name: Espeon
dexEntry: It uses the fine hair that covers its body to sense air currents and predict its enemy’s actions.

name: Umbreon
dexEntry: When agitated, this Pokémon protects itself by spraying poisonous sweat from its pores.

name: Murkrow
dexEntry: Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.

name: Slowking
dexEntry: It has incredible intellect and intuition. Whatever the situation, it remains calm and collected.

name: Misdreavus
dexEntry: It likes playing mischievous tricks, such as screaming and wailing to startle people at night.

name: Unown
dexEntry: Their shapes look like hieroglyphs on ancient tablets. It is said that the two are somehow related.

name: Wobbuffet
dexEntry: It hates light and shock. If attacked, it inflates its body to build up its counterstrike.

name: Girafarig
dexEntry: Its tail has a small brain of its own. Beware! If you get close, it may react to your scent by biting.

name: Pineco
dexEntry: It likes to make its shell thicker by adding layers of tree bark. The additional weight doesn’t bother it.

name: Forretress
dexEntry: Its entire body is shielded by a steel-hard shell. What lurks inside this shell is a total mystery.

name: Dunsparce
dexEntry: When spotted, this Pokémon escapes backward by furiously boring into the ground with its tail.

name: Gligar
dexEntry: It flies straight at its target’s face, then clamps down on the startled victim to inject poison.

name: Steelix
dexEntry: Its body has been compressed deep under the ground. As a result, it is even harder than a diamond.

name: Snubbull
dexEntry: Although it looks frightening, it is actually kind and affectionate. It is very popular among women.

name: Granbull
dexEntry: It is actually timid and easily spooked. If attacked, it flails about to fend off its attacker.

name: Qwilfish
dexEntry: To fire its poison spikes, it must inflate its body by drinking over 2.6 gallons of water all at once.

name: Scizor
dexEntry: It swings its eye-patterned pincers up to scare its foes. This makes it look like it has three heads.

name: Shuckle
dexEntry: The berries it stores in its vase-like shell decompose and become a gooey liquid.

name: Heracross
dexEntry: This powerful Pokémon thrusts its prized horn under its enemies’ bellies, then lifts and throws them.

name: Sneasel
dexEntry: Its paws conceal sharp claws. If attacked, it suddenly extends the claws and startles its enemy.

name: Teddiursa
dexEntry: If it finds honey, its crescent mark glows. It always licks its paws because they’re soaked with honey.

name: Ursaring
dexEntry: Although it is a good climber, it prefers to snap trees with its forelegs and eat fallen berries.

name: Slugma
dexEntry: It never sleeps. It has to keep moving because if it stopped, its magma body would cool and harden.

name: Magcargo
dexEntry: The shell on its back is just skin that has cooled and hardened. It breaks easily with a slight touch.

name: Swinub
dexEntry: It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs.

name: Piloswine
dexEntry: Because the long hair all over its body obscures its sight, it just keeps charging repeatedly.

name: Corsola
dexEntry: It continuously sheds and grows. The tip of its head is prized as a treasure because of its beauty.

name: Remoraid
dexEntry: It has superb accuracy. The water it shoots out can strike moving prey from more than 300 feet away.

name: Octillery
dexEntry: It traps foes with the suction cups on its tentacles, then smashes them with its rock-hard head.

name: Delibird
dexEntry: It carries food all day long. There are tales about lost people who were saved by its stored food.

name: Mantine
dexEntry: As it majestically swims, it doesn’t care if REMORAID attach to it for scavenging its leftovers.

name: Skarmory
dexEntry: Its sturdy wings look heavy, but they are actually hollow and light, allowing it to fly freely in the sky.

name: Houndour
dexEntry: It uses different kinds of cries for communicating with others of its kind and for pursuing its prey.

name: Houndoom
dexEntry: If you are burned by the flames it shoots from its mouth, the pain will never go away.

name: Kingdra
dexEntry: It is said that it usually hides in underwater caves. It can create whirlpools by yawning.

name: Phanpy
dexEntry: It swings its long snout around playfully, but because it is so strong, that can be dangerous.

name: Donphan
dexEntry: It has sharp, hard tusks and a rugged hide. Its tackle is strong enough to knock down a house.

name: Porygon2
dexEntry: This upgraded version of PORYGON is designed for space exploration. It can’t fly, however.

name: Stantler
dexEntry: The curved antlers subtly change the flow of air to create a strange space where reality is distorted.

name: Smeargle
dexEntry: A special fluid oozes from the tip of its tail. It paints the fluid everywhere to mark its territory.

name: Tyrogue
dexEntry: It is always bursting with energy. To make itself stronger, it keeps on fighting even if it loses.

name: Hitmontop
dexEntry: If you are enchanted by its smooth, dance-like kicks, you may get a closer experience with one than you’d like.

name: Smoochum
dexEntry: Its lips are the most sensitive part of its body. It always uses its lips first to examine things.

name: Elekid
dexEntry: It rotates its arms to generate electricity, but it tires easily, so it only charges up a little bit.

name: Magby
dexEntry: Each and every time it inhales and exhales, hot embers dribble from its mouth and nostrils.

name: Miltank
dexEntry: Its milk is packed with nutrition, making it the ultimate beverage for the sick or weary.

name: Blissey
dexEntry: Anyone who takes even one taste of BLISSEY’s egg becomes unfailingly caring and pleasant to everyone.

name: Raikou
dexEntry: The rain clouds it carries let it fire thunderbolts at will. They say that it descended with lightning.

name: Entei
dexEntry: Volcanoes erupt when it barks. Unable to contain its sheer power, it races headlong around the land.

name: Suicune
dexEntry: Said to be the embodiment of north winds, it can instantly purify filthy, murky water.

name: Larvitar
dexEntry: It feeds on soil. After it has eaten a large mountain, it falls asleep so it can grow.

name: Pupitar
dexEntry: Its shell is as hard as sheet rock, and it is also very strong. Its thrashing can topple a mountain.

name: Tyranitar
dexEntry: Its body can’t be harmed by any sort of attack, so it is very eager to make challenges against enemies.

name: Lugia
dexEntry: It is said that it quietly spends its time deep at the bottom of the sea because its powers are too strong.

name: Ho-oh
dexEntry: Legends claim this Pokémon flies the world’s skies continuously on its magnificent, seven-colored wings.

name: Celebi
dexEntry: This Pokémon wanders across time. Grass and trees flourish in the forests in which it has appeared.

name: Treecko
dexEntry: Small hooks on the bottom of its feet catch on walls and ceilings. That is how it can hang from above.

name: Grovyle
dexEntry: It leaps from tree branch to tree branch quite swiftly. It shows astounding agility.

name: Sceptile
dexEntry: It agilely leaps about the jungle and uses the sharp leaves on its arms to strike its prey.

name: Torchic
dexEntry: Inside its body is a place where it keeps a small flame. Hug it! It will be as warm as a hot-water bottle.

name: Combusken
dexEntry: During a battle, the hot flame in its body increases. Its kicks have outstanding destructive power.

name: Blaziken
dexEntry: It can clear a 30-story building in a leap. Its fiery punches scorch its foes.

name: Mudkip
dexEntry: Its power can crush boulders. It rests by covering itself with mud at the bottom of a river.

name: Marshtomp
dexEntry: Living on muddy ground that provides poor footing has made its legs sturdy.

name: Swampert
dexEntry: Its arms are hard as rock. With one swing, it can break a boulder into pieces.

name: Poochyena
dexEntry: It chases its prey until the victim becomes exhausted. However, it turns tail if the prey strikes back.

name: Mightyena
dexEntry: It chases down prey in a pack of around ten. They defeat foes with perfectly coordinated teamwork.

name: Zigzagoon
dexEntry: It gets interested in everything, which is why it zigs and zags. It is good at finding items.

name: Linoone
dexEntry: When running in a straight line, it can easily top 60 miles an hour. It has a tough time with curved roads.

name: Wurmple
dexEntry: It lives among the tall grass and in forests. It repels attacks by  raising up the spikes on its rear.

name: Silcoon
dexEntry: Having wrapped silk around the branches of a tree, it quiescently awaits evolution.

name: Beautifly
dexEntry: Vibrantly patterned wings are its prominent feature. It sucks sweet flower nectar with its long mouth.

name: Cascoon
dexEntry: It endures attacks with patience, because the more pain before evolution, the sturdier it becomes.

name: Dustox
dexEntry: It scatters its fine dust all over when it is attacked. It is a nocturnal Pokémon.

name: Lotad
dexEntry: Its leaf grew too large for it to live on land. That is how it began to live floating in the water.

name: Lombre
dexEntry: It is nocturnal and becomes active at nightfall. It feeds on aquatic mosses that grow in the riverbed.

name: Ludicolo
dexEntry: If it hears festive music, it begins moving in rhythm in order to amplify its power.

name: Seedot
dexEntry: It attaches itself to a tree branch using the top of its head. Strong winds can sometimes make it fall.

name: Nuzleaf
dexEntry: It lives deep in forests. With the leaf on its head, it makes a flute whose song makes listeners uneasy.

name: Shiftry
dexEntry: It lives quietly in the deep forest. It is said to create chilly winter winds with the fans it holds.

name: Taillow
dexEntry: When it gets cold, they migrate, flying over 180 miles a day. It hunts for tasty prey.

name: Swellow
dexEntry: It dives at a steep angle as soon as it spots its prey. It catches its prey with sharp claws.

name: Wingull
dexEntry: It soars on updrafts without flapping its wings. It makes a nest on sheer cliffs at the sea’s edge.

name: Pelipper
dexEntry: It protects its young in its beak. It bobs on waves, resting on them on days when the waters are calm.

name: Ralts
dexEntry: The horns on its head provide a strong power that enables it to sense people’s emotions.

name: Kirlia
dexEntry: It has a psychic power that enables it to distort the space around it and see into the future.

name: Gardevoir
dexEntry: It unleashes psychokinetic energy at full power when protecting a Trainer it has bonded closely with.

name: Surskit
dexEntry: It secretes a thick, sweet-scented syrup from the tip of its head. It lives on weed-choked ponds.

name: Masquerain
dexEntry: It flaps its four wings to hover and fly freely in any direction-- to and fro and sideways.

name: Shroomish
dexEntry: If it senses danger, it scatters spores from the top of its head to protect itself.

name: Breloom
dexEntry: It scatters poisonous spores and throws powerful punches while its foe is hampered by inhaled spores.

name: Slakoth
dexEntry: The way SLAKOTH lolls around makes anyone who watches it feel like doing the same.

name: Vigoroth
dexEntry: Its stress level rises if it cannot keep moving constantly. Too much stress makes it feel sick.

name: Slaking
dexEntry: The world’s laziest Pokémon. It moves to another spot when there’s no food left within its reach.

name: Nincada
dexEntry: It can sometimes live underground for more than 10 years. It absorbs nutrients from the roots of trees.

name: Ninjask
dexEntry: Its cry leaves a lasting headache if heard for too long. It moves so quickly that it is almost invisible.

name: Shedinja
dexEntry: A strange Pokémon--it flies without moving its wings, has a hollow shell for a body, and does not breathe.

name: Whismur
dexEntry: If it senses danger, it scares the foe by crying out with the volume of a jet-plane engine.

name: Loudred
dexEntry: It shouts loudly by inhaling air, and then uses its well-developed stomach muscles to exhale.

name: Exploud
dexEntry: Its roar in battle shakes the ground like a tremor--or like an earthquake has struck.

name: Makuhita
dexEntry: It toughens up by slamming into thick trees over and over. It gains a sturdy body and dauntless spirit.

name: Hariyama
dexEntry: It loves challenging others to tests of strength. It has the power to stop a train with a slap.

name: Azurill
dexEntry: Its tail is packed full of the nutrients it needs to grow.

name: Nosepass
dexEntry: If two of these meet, they cannot get too close because their noses repel each other.

name: Skitty
dexEntry: It’s adorable when it chases its own tail. It’s difficult to earn its trust.

name: Delcatty
dexEntry: It dislikes dirty places. It often searches for a comfortable place in which to groom itself.

name: Sableye
dexEntry: It dwells in the darkness of caves. It uses its sharp claws to dig up gems to nourish itself.

name: Mawile
dexEntry: It chomps with its gaping mouth. Its huge jaws are actually steel horns that have been transformed.

name: Aron
dexEntry: When it evolves, it sheds the steel carapace that covered its whole body and develops a new one.

name: Lairon
dexEntry: It loves iron ore. Groups of them fight for territory by bashing one another with their steel bodies.

name: Aggron
dexEntry: You can tell its age by the length of its iron horns. It claims an entire mountain as its territory.

name: Meditite
dexEntry: It meditates to heighten its inner energy and to float in the air. It eats one berry a day.

name: Medicham
dexEntry: Through yoga training, it gained the psychic power to predict its foe’s next move.

name: Electrike
dexEntry: It stores electricity in its fur. It gives off sparks from all over its body in seasons when the air is dry.

name: Manectric
dexEntry: Its nest can be found where a thunderbolt hits. It is discharging electricity from its mane.

name: Plusle
dexEntry: It absorbs electricity from telephone poles. It shorts out its body to create crackling noises.

name: Minun
dexEntry: Exposure to electricity from MINUN and PLUSLE promotes blood circulation and relaxes muscles.

name: Volbeat
dexEntry: It emits light from its tail to communicate. It loves the sweet aroma given off by ILLUMISE.

name: Illumise
dexEntry: Its fragrance attracts a swarm of VOLBEAT, so they draw over 200 patterns in the night sky.

name: Roselia
dexEntry: ROSELIA that drink nutritionally rich springwater are said to reveal rare coloration when they bloom.

name: Gulpin
dexEntry: It has a small heart and brain. Its stomach comprises most of its body, with enzymes to dissolve anything.

name: Swalot
dexEntry: It gulps anything that fits in its mouth. Its special enzymes can dissolve anything.

name: Carvanha
dexEntry: They form packs to attack boats and rip out their hulls to sink them. They live in rivers in the jungle.

name: Sharpedo
dexEntry: It can swim at speeds of 75 mph by jetting seawater through its body. It is the bandit of the sea.

name: Wailmer
dexEntry: It bounces playfully like a ball. The more seawater it swallows, the higher it bounces.

name: Wailord
dexEntry: It is the largest of all identified Pokémon. They jump as a pack to herd their prey.

name: Numel
dexEntry: The flaming magma it stores in the hump on its back is the source of its tremendous power.

name: Camerupt
dexEntry: It lives in the crater of a volcano. It is well known that the humps on its back erupt every 10 years.

name: Torkoal
dexEntry: You find abandoned coal mines full of them. They dig tirelessly in search of coal.

name: Spoink
dexEntry: It bounces around on its tail to keep its heart pumping. It carries a pearl from CLAMPERL on its head.

name: Grumpig
dexEntry: It can perform odd dance steps to influence foes. Its style of dancing became hugely popular overseas.

name: Spinda
dexEntry: The chances of two SPINDA having identical spot patterns is less than one in four billion.

name: Trapinch
dexEntry: Its nest is a sloped, bowl-like pit in the desert. Once something has fallen in, there is no escape.

name: Vibrava
dexEntry: It vibrates its wings vigorously, creating ultrasonic waves that cause serious headaches.

name: Flygon
dexEntry: It is nicknamed “The Desert Spirit” because the flapping of its wings sounds like a woman singing.

name: Cacnea
dexEntry: It lives in arid locations. Its yellow flowers bloom once a year.

name: Cacturne
dexEntry: Packs of them follow travelers through the desert until the travelers can no longer move.

name: Swablu
dexEntry: Its wings bring cottony clouds to mind. It grooms with springwater and loves to sit on heads.

name: Altaria
dexEntry: It flies gracefully through the sky. Its melodic humming makes you feel like you’re in a dream.

name: Zangoose
dexEntry: Its fur would all stand on end if it smelled a SEVIPER nearby. Its sharp claws tear up its foes.

name: Seviper
dexEntry: In battle, it uses its bladed tail to counter any ZANGOOSE. It secretes a deadly venom in its tail.

name: Lunatone
dexEntry: It was discovered at the site of a meteor strike 40 years ago. Its stare can lull its foes to sleep.

name: Solrock
dexEntry: When it rotates itself, it gives off light similar to the sun, thus blinding its foes.

name: Barboach
dexEntry: BARBOACH uses its whiskers to taste things just as a person uses his or her tongue to taste things.

name: Whiscash
dexEntry: It claims a large swamp to itself. If a foe comes near it, it sets off tremors by thrashing around.

name: Corphish
dexEntry: It was originally a Pokémon from afar that escaped to the wild. It can adapt to the dirtiest river.

name: Crawdaunt
dexEntry: A brutish Pokémon that loves to battle. It will crash itself into any foe that approaches its nest.

name: Baltoy
dexEntry: It moves while spinning around on its single foot. Some BALTOY have been seen spinning on their heads.

name: Claydol
dexEntry: It is said that it originates from clay dolls made by an ancient civilization.

name: Lileep
dexEntry: It disguises its tentacles as flowers to attract and catch prey. It became extinct in ancient times.

name: Cradily
dexEntry: It lives in warm seas. Its heavy body weighs it down so it won’t get washed away in rough weather.

name: Anorith
dexEntry: An ancestral Pokémon that lived in the ocean. Over time, its eight feet transformed into wings.

name: Armaldo
dexEntry: Its enormous, retractable claws can cut through most anything. Its entire body is clad in sturdy plates.

name: Feebas
dexEntry: It is the shabbiest Pokémon of all. It forms in schools and lives at the bottom of rivers.

name: Milotic
dexEntry: It’s said that a glimpse of a MILOTIC and its beauty will calm any hostile emotions you’re feeling.

name: Castform
dexEntry: This Pokémon can change its cells, taking different forms based on the temperature and humidity.

name: Kecleon
dexEntry: It changes its shading to match its surroundings so it can sneak up on prey. Only its belly patterns stay fixed.

name: Shuppet
dexEntry: It uses its horn to feed on envy and malice, or so it’s said. It’s very active at night.

name: Banette
dexEntry: This Pokémon developed from an abandoned doll that amassed a grudge. It is seen in dark alleys.

name: Duskull
dexEntry: If it finds bad children who won’t listen to their parents, it will spirit them away--or so it’s said.

name: Dusclops
dexEntry: Anyone who dares peer into its body to see its spectral ball of fire will have their spirit stolen away.

name: Tropius
dexEntry: The bunch of fruit around its neck ripens twice a year and is delicious. It’s a highly favored tropical snack.

name: Chimecho
dexEntry: It uses the sucker on its head to hang from a tree or from eaves. It can produce seven different tones.

name: Absol
dexEntry: It has the ability to foretell natural disasters. Its life span is over a hundred years.

name: Wynaut
dexEntry: It tends to move in a pack. Individuals squash against one another to toughen their spirits.

name: Snorunt
dexEntry: It’s said that if they are seen at midnight, they’ll cause heavy snow. They eat snow and ice to survive.

name: Glalie
dexEntry: It can instantly freeze moisture in the atmosphere. It uses this power to freeze its foes.

name: Spheal
dexEntry: It crosses the oceans by rolling itself on drifting ice. Fluffy fur keeps it warm when the temperature is below freezing.

name: Sealeo
dexEntry: It has a very sensitive nose. It touches new things with its nose to examine them.

name: Walrein
dexEntry: It shatters drift ice with its strong tusks. Its thick layer of blubber repels enemy attacks.

name: Clamperl
dexEntry: When it evolves, it makes a mysterious pearl that amplifies psychic powers when it’s held.

name: Huntail
dexEntry: It lives deep in the pitch-dark sea. It attracts prey by moving its tail in mimicry of a small animal.

name: Gorebyss
dexEntry: Its pink body becomes more vivid with the rise of water temperatures in the springtime.

name: Relicanth
dexEntry: Discovered by chance during deep-sea explorations, it has not changed since ancient times.

name: Luvdisc
dexEntry: Its heart-shaped body makes it popular. In some places, you would give a LUVDISC to someone you love.

name: Bagon
dexEntry: Its well-developed neck muscles and ironlike head can smash boulders into pieces.

name: Shelgon
dexEntry: It surrounds its body in an iron-hard shell to accumulate enough power to evolve.

name: Salamence
dexEntry: It’s uncontrollable if enraged. It flies around spouting flames and scorching fields and mountains.

name: Beldum
dexEntry: The magnetic force generated by its body repels the ground’s natural magnetism, letting it float.

name: Metang
dexEntry: When two BELDUM fuse together, a magnetic nervous system places their brains in union.

name: Metagross
dexEntry: It folds its four legs when flying. Its four brains are said to be superior to a supercomputer.

name: Regirock
dexEntry: The same rocks that form its body have been found in ground layers around the world.

name: Regice
dexEntry: It is said to have slept in a glacier for thousands of years. Its body can’t be melted, even by magma.

name: Registeel
dexEntry: Its body is said to be harder than any kind of metal. A study has revealed that its body is hollow.

name: Latias
dexEntry: It communicates using telepathy. Its body is covered in down that refracts light to make it invisible.

name: Latios
dexEntry: It understands human speech and is highly intelligent. It is a tender Pokémon that dislikes fighting.

name: Kyogre
dexEntry: A mythical Pokémon said to have swelled the seas with rain and tidal waves. It battled with GROUDON.

name: Groudon
dexEntry: Said to have expanded the lands by evaporating water with raging heat. It battled titanically with KYOGRE.

name: Rayquaza
dexEntry: It flies in the ozone layer, way up high in the sky. Until recently, no one had ever seen it.

name: Jirachi
dexEntry: Generations have believed that any wish written on a note on its head will come true when it awakens.

name: Deoxys
dexEntry: DNA from a space virus mutated and became a Pokémon. It appears where auroras are seen.

name: Turtwig
dexEntry: Photosynthesis occurs across its body under the sun. The shell on its back is actually hardened soil.

name: Grotle
dexEntry: A GROTLE that lives in the forest is said to have its own secret springwater.

name: Torterra
dexEntry: Ancient people imagined that beneath the ground, a gigantic TORTERRA dwelled.

name: Chimchar
dexEntry: The gas made in its belly burns from its rear end. The fire burns weakly when it feels sick.

name: Monferno
dexEntry: A bigger fire on its tail and a brighter blue pattern on its face means its rank in its pack is higher.

name: Infernape
dexEntry: It tosses its enemies around with agility. It uses all its limbs to fight in its own unique style.

name: Piplup
dexEntry: It doesn’t like to be taken care of. It’s difficult to bond with since it won’t listen to its Trainer.

name: Prinplup
dexEntry: It lives a solitary life. Its wings deliver wicked blows that can snap even the thickest of trees.

name: Empoleon
dexEntry: It avoids unnecessary disputes, but it will decimate anything that threatens its pride.

name: Starly
dexEntry: They flock around mountains and fields, chasing after bug Pokémon. Their singing is noisy and annoying.

name: Staravia
dexEntry: They maintain huge flocks, although fierce scuffles break out between various flocks.

name: Staraptor
dexEntry: When STARAVIA evolve into STARAPTOR, they leave the flock to live alone. They have sturdy wings.

name: Bidoof
dexEntry: It lives in groups by the water.  It chews up boulders and trees around its nest with its incisors.

name: Bibarel
dexEntry: It busily makes its nest with stacks of branches and roots it has cut up with its sharp incisors.

name: Kricketot
dexEntry: When its antennae hit each other, it sounds like the music of a xylophone.

name: Kricketune
dexEntry: By allowing its cry to resonate in the hollow of its belly, it produces a captivating sound.

name: Shinx
dexEntry: The extension and contraction of its muscles generates electricity. Its fur glows when it’s in trouble.

name: Luxio
dexEntry: By gathering their tails together, they collectively generate powerful electricity from their claws.

name: Luxray
dexEntry: LUXRAY’s ability to see through objects comes in handy when it’s scouting for danger.

name: Budew
dexEntry: When it feels the sun’s warm touch, it opens its bud to release pollen. It lives alongside clear pools.

name: Roserade
dexEntry: Its sweet aroma attracts prey. Then it spews poison. The more toxic it is, the sweeter its aroma.

name: Cranidos
dexEntry: CRANIDOS toughen up their already rock-hard heads by headbutting one another.

name: Rampardos
dexEntry: Its skull withstands impacts of any magnitude. As a result, its brain never gets the chance to grow.

name: Shieldon
dexEntry: It was generated from a fossil dug out of a layer of clay that was older than anyone knows. It has a sturdy face.

name: Bastiodon
dexEntry: When attacked, they form a wall. Their rock-hard faces serve to protect them from the attacks.

name: Burmy
dexEntry: It covers itself with a cloak to shelter from the cold. When it’s hot, its cloak is thinner.

name: Wormadam
dexEntry: It is said that a WORMADAM that evolves on a cold day will have a thicker cloak.

name: Mothim
dexEntry: It flutters around at night and steals honey from the COMBEE hive.

name: Combee
dexEntry: At night, COMBEE sleep in a group of about a thousand, packed closely together in a lump.

name: Vespiquen
dexEntry: It raises grubs in the holes in its body. It secretes pheromones to control COMBEE.

name: Pachirisu
dexEntry: It’s one of the kinds of Pokémon  with electric cheek pouches. It shoots charges from its tail.

name: Buizel
dexEntry: It inflates its flotation sac, keeping its face above water in order to watch for prey movement.

name: Floatzel
dexEntry: With its flotation sac inflated, it can carry people on its back. It deflates the sac before it dives.

name: Cherubi
dexEntry: It evolves by sucking the energy out of the small ball where it had been storing nutrients.

name: Cherrim
dexEntry: During times of strong sunlight, its bud blooms, its petals open fully, and it becomes very active.

name: Shellos
dexEntry: Its shape and coloration vary, depending on its habitat.

name: Gastrodon
dexEntry: When its natural enemy attacks, it oozes purple fluid and escapes.

name: Ambipom
dexEntry: They live on large trees. They are said to communicate by connecting their tails to those of others.

name: Drifloon
dexEntry: It is whispered that any child who mistakes DRIFLOON for a balloon and holds on to it could wind up missing.

name: Drifblim
dexEntry: It can generate and release gas within its body. That’s how it can control the altitude of its drift.

name: Buneary
dexEntry: You can tell how it feels by the way it rolls its ears. When it’s scared, both ears are rolled up.

name: Lopunny
dexEntry: It sheds its fur twice a year. Its winter fur is soft and fluffy.

name: Mismagius
dexEntry: Its cries sound like incantations to torment the foe. It appears where you least expect it.

name: Honchkrow
dexEntry: It is merciless by nature. It is said that it never forgives the mistakes of its MURKROW followers.

name: Glameow
dexEntry: When it’s happy, GLAMEOW demonstrates beautiful movements of its tail, like a dancing ribbon.

name: Purugly
dexEntry: It would claim another Pokémon’s nest as its own if it finds a nest sufficiently comfortable.

name: Chingling
dexEntry: It emits high-frequency cries that  people can’t hear. Once it starts, it can cry for an awfully long time.

name: Stunky
dexEntry: The foul fluid from its rear is so revolting that it can make people feel queasy up to a mile and a quarter away.

name: Skuntank
dexEntry: It attacks by spraying a repugnant fluid from its tail, but the stench dulls after a few squirts.

name: Bronzor
dexEntry: Ancient people believed that the pattern on BRONZOR’s back contained a mysterious power.

name: Bronzong
dexEntry: Ancient people believed that petitioning BRONZONG for rain was the way to make crops grow.

name: Bonsly
dexEntry: In order to adjust the level of fluids in its body, it exudes water from its eyes. This makes it appear to be crying.

name: Mime Jr.
dexEntry: In an attempt to confuse its enemy, it mimics the enemy’s movements. Then it wastes no time in making itself scarce!

name: Happiny
dexEntry: It carefully carries a round, white rock that it thinks is an egg. It’s bothered by how curly its hair looks.

name: Chatot
dexEntry: It mimics the cries of other Pokémon to trick them into thinking it’s one of them. This way they won’t attack it.

name: Spiritomb
dexEntry: It was formed by uniting 108 spirits. It has been bound to the Odd Keystone to keep it from doing any mischief.

name: Gible
dexEntry: It nests in horizontal holes warmed by geothermal heat. Foes who get too close can expect to be pounced on and bitten.

name: Gabite
dexEntry: As it digs to expand its nest, it habitually digs up gems that it then hoards in its nest.

name: Garchomp
dexEntry: Its body is covered in fine scales that reduce drag, enabling it to fly at high speeds.

name: Munchlax
dexEntry: It conceals food under the long fur on its body. It carts around this food stash and swallows it without chewing.

name: Riolu
dexEntry: They communicate with one another using their auras. They are able to run all through the night.

name: Lucario
dexEntry: It’s said that no foe can remain invisible to LUCARIO, since it can detect auras. Even foes it could not otherwise see.

name: Hippopotas
dexEntry: It shrouds itself in sand to ward off germs. It travels easily through the sands of the desert.

name: Hippowdon
dexEntry: It brandishes its gaping mouth in a display of fearsome strength. It raises vast quantities of sand while attacking.

name: Skorupi
dexEntry: It burrows under the sand to lie in wait for prey. Its tail claws can inject its prey with a savage poison.

name: Drapion
dexEntry: It attacks people and Pokémon that cross the desert. This has only furthered its bad reputation.

name: Croagunk
dexEntry: Fluid squeezed from its finger, albeit poisonous, is a significant ingredient in remedies for lower-back pain.

name: Toxicroak
dexEntry: Swaying and dodging the attacks of its foes, it weaves its flexible body in close, then lunges out with its poisonous claws.

name: Carnivine
dexEntry: It walks around on its tentacles in search of a tree branch where it can dangle down and ambush prey.

name: Finneon
dexEntry: Swimming and fluttering its two tail fins, it looks like a BEAUTIFLY. At night, the patterns on its tail fins softly shine.

name: Lumineon
dexEntry: LUMINEON swimming in the darkness of the deep sea look like stars shining in the night sky.

name: Mantyke
dexEntry: When it swims close to the surface of the ocean, people aboard ships are able to observe the pattern on its back.

name: Snover
dexEntry: During cold seasons, it migrates to the mountain’s lower reaches. It returns to the snow-covered summit in the spring.

name: Abomasnow
dexEntry: It lives a quiet life on mountains that are perpetually covered in snow. It hides itself by whipping up blizzards.

name: Weavile
dexEntry: It lives in snowy regions. It carves patterns in trees with its claws as a signal to others.

name: Magnezone
dexEntry: Exposure to a special magnetic field changed MAGNETON’s molecular structure, turning it into MAGNEZONE.

name: Lickilicky
dexEntry: Its saliva can decompose anything. It wraps its long tongue around things to coat them with its sticky saliva.

name: Rhyperior
dexEntry: From holes in its palms, it fires out GEODUDE. Its carapace  can withstand volcanic eruptions.

name: Tangrowth
dexEntry: When it remains still, it appears to be a large shrub. Unsuspecting prey that wander near get ensnared by its vines.

name: Electivire
dexEntry: As its electric charge amplifies, blue sparks begin to crackle between its horns.

name: Magmortar
dexEntry: It blasts fireballs of over 3,600 degrees Fahrenheit out of its arms. Its breath also sears and sizzles.

name: Togekiss
dexEntry: As everyone knows, it visits peaceful regions, bringing them gifts of kindness and sweet blessings.

name: Yanmega
dexEntry: This six-legged Pokémon is easily capable of transporting an adult in flight. The wings on its tail help it stay balanced.

name: Leafeon
dexEntry: When you see LEAFEON asleep in a patch of sunshine, you’ll know it is using photosynthesis to produce clean air.

name: Glaceon
dexEntry: It causes small ice crystals to form by lowering the temperature of the surrounding atmosphere.

name: Gliscor
dexEntry: Its flight is soundless. It uses its lengthy tail to carry off its prey... Then its elongated fangs do the rest.

name: Mamoswine
dexEntry: A frozen MAMOSWINE was dug from ice dating back 10,000 years. This Pokémon has been around a long, long, long time.

name: Porygon-Z
dexEntry: Its programming was modified to enable it to travel through alien dimensions. Seems there might have been an error...

name: Gallade
dexEntry: Because it can sense what its foe is thinking, its attacks burst out first, fast, and fierce.

name: Probopass
dexEntry: It controls three units called Mini-Noses using magnetic force. With them, it can attack the foe from three directions.

name: Dusknoir
dexEntry: This feared Pokémon is said to travel to worlds unknown. Some even believe that it takes lost spirits along with it.

name: Froslass
dexEntry: Legends in snowy regions say that a woman who was lost on an icy mountain was reborn as FROSLASS.

name: Rotom
dexEntry: Research continues on this Pokémon, which could be the power source of a unique motor.

name: Uxie
dexEntry: According to some sources, this Pokémon provided people with the intelligence necessary to solve various problems.

name: Mesprit
dexEntry: This Pokémon is said to have endowed the human heart with emotions, such as sorrow and joy.

name: Azelf
dexEntry: This Pokémon is said to have endowed humans with the determination needed to face any of life’s difficulties.

name: Dialga
dexEntry: This Pokémon completely controls the flow of time. It uses its power to travel at will through the past and future.

name: Palkia
dexEntry: Its total control over the boundaries of space enable it to transport itself to faraway places or even other dimensions.

name: Heatran
dexEntry: Boiling blood, like magma, circulates through its body. It makes its dwelling place in volcanic caves.

name: Regigigas
dexEntry: It is believed to have shaped REGIROCK, REGICE, and REGISTEEL out of clay, ice, and magma.

name: Giratina
dexEntry: This Pokémon is said to live in a world on the reverse side of ours, where common knowledge is distorted and strange.

name: Cresselia
dexEntry: Those who sleep holding CRESSELIA’s feather are assured of joyful dreams. It is said to represent the crescent moon.

name: Phione
dexEntry: When the water warms, they inflate the flotation sac on their heads and drift languidly on the sea in packs.

name: Manaphy
dexEntry: It starts its life with a wondrous power that permits it to bond with any kind of Pokémon.

name: Darkrai
dexEntry: It chases people and Pokémon from its territory by causing them to experience deep, nightmarish slumbers.

name: Shaymin
dexEntry: The blooming of Gracidea flowers confers the power of flight upon it. Feelings  of gratitude are the message it delivers.

name: Arceus
dexEntry: It is told in mythology that this Pokémon was born before the universe even existed.

name: Victini
dexEntry: When it shares the infinite energy it creates, that being's entire body will be overflowing with power.

name: Snivy
dexEntry: Being exposed to sunlight makes its movements swifter. It uses vines more adeptly than its hands.

name: Servine
dexEntry: When it gets dirty, its leaves can't be used in photosynthesis, so it always keeps itself clean.

name: Serperior
dexEntry: It only gives its all against strong opponents who are not fazed by the glare from Serperior's noble eyes.

name: Tepig
dexEntry: It loves to eat roasted berries, but sometimes it gets too excited and burns them to a crisp.

name: Pignite
dexEntry: The more it eats, the more fuel it has to make the fire in its stomach stronger. This fills it with even more power.

name: Emboar
dexEntry: A flaring beard of fire is proof that it is fired up. It is adept at using many different moves.

name: Oshawott
dexEntry: The scalchop on its stomach isn't just used for battle--it can be used to break open hard berries as well.

name: Dewott
dexEntry: As a result of strict training, each Dewott learns different forms for using the scalchops.

name: Samurott
dexEntry: In the time it takes a foe to blink, it can draw and sheathe the seamitars attached to its front legs.

name: Patrat
dexEntry: Extremely cautious, one of them will always be on the lookout, but it won't notice a foe coming from behind.

name: Watchog
dexEntry: Using luminescent matter, it makes its eyes and body glow and stuns attacking opponents.

name: Lillipup
dexEntry: Though it is a very brave Pokémon, it's also smart enough to check its foe's strength and avoid battle.

name: Herdier
dexEntry: This very loyal Pokémon helps Trainers, and it also takes care of other Pokémon.

name: Stoutland
dexEntry: Being wrapped in its long fur is so comfortable that a person would be fine even overnight on a wintry mountain.

name: Purrloin
dexEntry: Their cute act is a ruse. They trick people and steal their valuables just to see the looks on their faces.

name: Liepard
dexEntry: Their beautiful form comes from the muscles they have developed. They run silently in the night.

name: Pansage
dexEntry: It's good at finding berries and gathers them from all over. It's kind enough to share them with friends.

name: Simisage
dexEntry: It strikes its enemies with a thorn-covered tail. The leaf on its head is bitter.

name: Pansear
dexEntry: Very intelligent, it roasts berries before eating them. It likes to help people.

name: Simisear
dexEntry: When it gets excited, embers rise from its head and tail and it gets hot. For some reason, it loves sweets.

name: Panpour
dexEntry: The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. It waters plants with it using its tail.

name: Simipour
dexEntry: It prefers places with clean water. When its tuft runs low, it replenishes it by siphoning up water with its tail.

name: Munna
dexEntry: This Pokémon appears before people and Pokémon who are having nightmares and eats those dreams.

name: Musharna
dexEntry: The dream mist coming from its forehead changes into many different colors depending on the dream that was eaten.

name: Pidove
dexEntry: This very forgetful Pokémon will wait for a new order from its Trainer even though it already has one.

name: Tranquill
dexEntry: No matter where in the world it goes, it knows where its nest is, so it never gets separated from its Trainer.

name: Unfezant
dexEntry: Males swing the plumage on their heads to threaten others, but females are better at flying.

name: Blitzle
dexEntry: Its mane shines when it discharges electricity. They use the frequency and rhythm of these flashes to communicate.

name: Zebstrika
dexEntry: When this ill-tempered Pokémon runs wild, it shoots lightning from its mane in all directions.

name: Roggenrola
dexEntry: The hexagonal-shaped hole is its ear. It has a tendency to walk in the direction the sound is coming from.

name: Boldore
dexEntry: When it is healthy, its core sticks out. Always facing the same way, it swiftly moves front to back and left to right.

name: Gigalith
dexEntry: The solar rays it absorbs are processed in its energy core and fired as a ball of light.

name: Woobat
dexEntry: The heart-shaped mark left on a body after a Woobat has been attached to it is said to bring good fortune.

name: Swoobat
dexEntry: It shakes its tail vigorously when it emits ultrasonic waves strong enough to reduce concrete to rubble.

name: Drilbur
dexEntry: By spinning its body, it can dig straight through the ground at a speed of 30 mph.

name: Excadrill
dexEntry: Forming a drill with its steel claws and head, it can bore through a steel plate, no matter how thick it is.

name: Audino
dexEntry: Using the feelers on its ears, it can tell how someone is feeling or when an egg might hatch.

name: Timburr
dexEntry: Always carrying squared logs, they help out with construction. As they grow, they carry bigger logs.

name: Gurdurr
dexEntry: With strengthened bodies, they skillfully wield steel beams to take down buildings.

name: Conkeldurr
dexEntry: Rather than rely on force, they master moves that utilize the centrifugal force of spinning concrete.

name: Tympole
dexEntry: By vibrating its cheeks, it emits sound waves imperceptible to humans and warns others of danger.

name: Palpitoad
dexEntry: It lives in the water and on land. It uses its long, sticky tongue to immobilize its opponents.

name: Seismitoad
dexEntry: By putting power into its bumps, it creates vibrations and increases the power of its punches.

name: Throh
dexEntry: When it encounters a foe bigger than itself, it wants to throw it. It changes belts as it gets stronger.

name: Sawk
dexEntry: Desiring the strongest karate chop, they seclude themselves in mountains and train without sleeping.

name: Sewaddle
dexEntry: Since this Pokémon makes its own clothes out of leaves, it is a popular mascot for fashion designers.

name: Swadloon
dexEntry: Preferring dark, damp places, it spends the entire day eating fallen leaves that lie around it.

name: Leavanny
dexEntry: Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves by using the sticky silk secreted from its mouth.

name: Venipede
dexEntry: Using the feelers on its head and tail, it picks up vibrations in the air to determine its prey's location and state.

name: Whirlipede
dexEntry: Storing energy for evolution, it sits. But, when predators approach, it moves to stab them with poison spikes.

name: Scolipede
dexEntry: It clasps its prey with the claws on its neck until it stops moving. Then it finishes it off with deadly poison.

name: Cottonee
dexEntry: Perhaps because they feel more at ease in a group, they stick to others they find. They end up looking like a cloud.

name: Whimsicott
dexEntry: They appear along with whirlwinds. They pull pranks, such as moving furniture and leaving balls of cotton in homes.

name: Petilil
dexEntry: The leaves on its head grow right back even if they fall out. These bitter leaves refresh those who eat them.

name: Lilligant
dexEntry: The fragrance of the garland on its head has a relaxing effect, but taking care of it is very difficult.

name: Basculin
dexEntry: Red- and blue-striped Basculin are very violent and always fighting. They are also remarkably tasty.

name: Sandile
dexEntry: They live hidden under hot desert sands in order to keep their body temperature from dropping.

name: Krokorok
dexEntry: Protected by thin membranes, their eyes can see even in the dead of night. They live in groups of a few individuals.

name: Krookodile
dexEntry: Very violent Pokémon, they try to clamp down on anything that moves in front of their eyes.

name: Darumaka
dexEntry: When it sleeps, it pulls its limbs into its body and its internal fire goes down to 1,100 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Darmanitan
dexEntry: Its internal fire burns at 2,500 degrees Fahrenheit, making enough power that it can destroy a dump truck with one punch.

name: Maractus
dexEntry: When it moves rhythmically, it makes a sound similar to maracas, making the surprised Pokémon flee.

name: Dwebble
dexEntry: When it finds a stone of a suitable size, it secretes a liquid from its mouth to open up a hole to crawl into.

name: Crustle
dexEntry: When its boulder is broken in battles for territory, it feels unsure and begins to weaken.

name: Scraggy
dexEntry: Proud of its sturdy skull, it suddenly headbutts everything, but its weight makes it unstable, too.

name: Scrafty
dexEntry: It pulls up its shed skin to protect itself while it kicks. The bigger the crest, the more respected it is.

name: Sigilyph
dexEntry: The guardians of an ancient city, they always fly the same route while keeping watch for invaders.

name: Yamask
dexEntry: These Pokémon arose from the spirits of people interred in graves. Each retains memories of its former life.

name: Cofagrigus
dexEntry: Grave robbers who mistake them for real coffins and get too close end up trapped inside their bodies.

name: Tirtouga
dexEntry: This Pokémon was restored from a fossil. It swam skillfully and dove to depths beyond half a mile.

name: Carracosta
dexEntry: It could knock out a foe with a slap from one of its developed front appendages and chew it up, shell or bones and all.

name: Archen
dexEntry: It was revived from an ancient fossil. Not able to fly, it lived in treetops and hopped from one branch to another.

name: Archeops
dexEntry: It runs better than it flies. It takes off into the sky by running at a speed of 25 mph.

name: Trubbish
dexEntry: Wanting more garbage, they follow people who litter. They always belch poison gas.

name: Garbodor
dexEntry: Consuming garbage makes new kinds of poison gases and liquids inside their bodies.

name: Zorua
dexEntry: It changes so it looks just like its foe, tricks it, and then uses that opportunity to flee.

name: Zoroark
dexEntry: Stories say those who tried to catch Zoroark were trapped in an illusion and punished.

name: Minccino
dexEntry: Minccino greet each other by grooming one another thoroughly with their tails.

name: Cinccino
dexEntry: Cinccino's body is coated in a special oil that helps it deflect attacks, such as punches.

name: Gothita
dexEntry: It stares intently at everything. It can become so obsessed with watching that it doesn't notice attacks.

name: Gothorita
dexEntry: According to many old tales, it creates friends for itself by controlling sleeping children on starry nights.

name: Gothitelle
dexEntry: It can see the future from the movement of the stars. When it learns its Trainer's life span, it cries in sadness.

name: Solosis
dexEntry: Because their bodies are enveloped in a special liquid, they are fine in any environment, no matter how severe.

name: Duosion
dexEntry: When their two divided brains think the same thoughts, their psychic power is maximized.

name: Reuniclus
dexEntry: They use psychic power to control their arms, which are made of a special liquid. They can crush boulders psychically.

name: Ducklett
dexEntry: They are better at swimming than flying, and they happily eat their favorite food, peat moss, as they dive underwater.

name: Swanna
dexEntry: Despite their elegant appearance, they can flap their wings strongly and fly for thousands of miles.

name: Vanillite
dexEntry: Theoretically, this Pokémon formed from icicles bathed in energy from the morning sun. Their breath is -58 degrees Farenheit.

name: Vanillish
dexEntry: They cool down the surrounding air and create ice particles, which they use to freeze their foes.

name: Vanilluxe
dexEntry: Swallowing large amounts of water, they make snow clouds inside their bodies and, when angry, cause violent blizzards.

name: Deerling
dexEntry: Their coloring changes according to the seasons and can be slightly affected by the temperature and humidity as well.

name: Sawsbuck
dexEntry: They migrate according to the seasons, so some people call Sawsbuck the harbingers of spring.

name: Emolga
dexEntry: It glides on its outstretched membrane while shocking foes with the electricity stored in the pouches on its cheeks.

name: Karrablast
dexEntry: For some reason they evolve when they receive electrical energy while they are attacking Shelmet.

name: Escavalier
dexEntry: Wearing the shell covering they stole from Shelmet, they defend themselves and attack with two lances.

name: Foongus
dexEntry: It lures Pokémon with its pattern that looks just like a Poké Ball then releases poison spores.

name: Amoonguss
dexEntry: It moves the caps on both arms and does a dance to lure prey. It prefers damp places.

name: Frillish
dexEntry: If its veil-like arms stun and wrap a foe, that foe will be dragged miles below the surface, never to return.

name: Jellicent
dexEntry: Its body is mostly seawater. It's said there's a castle of ships Jellicent have sunk on the seafloor.

name: Alomomola
dexEntry: It gently holds injured and weak Pokémon in its fins. Its special membrane heals their wounds.

name: Joltik
dexEntry: Since it can't generate its own electricity, it sticks onto large-bodied Pokémon and absorbs static electricity.

name: Galvantula
dexEntry: It creates barriers from electrified silk that stun foes. This works as a weapon as well as a defense.

name: Ferroseed
dexEntry: It absorbs the iron it finds in the rock while clinging to the ceiling. It shoots spikes when in danger.

name: Ferrothorn
dexEntry: By swinging around its three spiky feelers and shooting spikes, it can obliterate an opponent.

name: Klink
dexEntry: Two bodies comprise a fixed pair. They spin around each other to generate energy.

name: Klang
dexEntry: A minigear and big gear comprise its body. If the minigear it launches at a foe doesn't return, it will die.

name: Klinklang
dexEntry: The minigear spins at high speed. Then the energy from the red core charges the minigear to make it ready to fire.

name: Tynamo
dexEntry: One alone can emit only a trickle of electricity, so a group of them gathers to unleash a powerful electric shock.

name: Eelektrik
dexEntry: It wraps itself around its prey and paralyzes it with electricity from the round spots on its sides. Then it chomps.

name: Eelektross
dexEntry: It latches on to prey with its sucker mouth, sinking in its fangs and shocking the prey with powerful electricity.

name: Elgyem
dexEntry: Rumors of its origin are linked to a UFO crash site in the desert 50 years ago.

name: Beheeyem
dexEntry: Apparently, it communicates by flashing its three fingers, but those patterns haven't been decoded.

name: Litwick
dexEntry: Its flame is usually out, but it starts shining when Litwick absorbs life-force from people or Pokémon.

name: Lampent
dexEntry: The spirits it absorbs fuel its baleful fire. It hangs around hospitals waiting for people to pass on.

name: Chandelure
dexEntry: The spirits burned up in its ominous flame lose their way and wander this world forever.

name: Axew
dexEntry: Its large tusks have a tendency to break, but each time they grow back, they grow in harder and sturdier.

name: Fraxure
dexEntry: A broken tusk will not grow back, so it diligently sharpens its tusks on river rocks after the end of a battle.

name: Haxorus
dexEntry: Its tusks are incredibly destructive. They can easily slice through a thick, sturdy steel column every time.

name: Cubchoo
dexEntry: Their snot is a barometer of health. When healthy, their snot is sticky and the power of their ice moves increases.

name: Beartic
dexEntry: They love the cold seas of the north. They create pathways across the ocean waters by freezing their own breath.

name: Cryogonal
dexEntry: They are composed of ice crystals. They capture prey with chains of ice, freezing the prey at -148 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Shelmet
dexEntry: When it and Karrablast are together, and both receive electrical stimulation, they both evolve.

name: Accelgor
dexEntry: When its body dries out, it weakens. So it wraps a membrane around itself for protection while it spits poison.

name: Stunfisk
dexEntry: When its opponent can't be paralyzed, it contorts itself with unexpected speed and flops away.

name: Mienfoo
dexEntry: It takes pride in the speed at which it can use moves. What it loses in power, it makes up for in quantity.

name: Mienshao
dexEntry: Using the long fur on its arms like whips, it launches into combo attacks that, once started, no one can stop.

name: Druddigon
dexEntry: It runs through the narrow tunnels formed by Excadrill and Onix. It uses its sharp claws to catch prey.

name: Golett
dexEntry: Ancient science fashioned this Pokémon from clay. It's been active for thousands of years.

name: Golurk
dexEntry: Golurk were created to protect people and Pokémon. They run on a mysterious energy.

name: Pawniard
dexEntry: Ignoring their injuries, groups attack by sinking the blades that cover their bodies into their prey.

name: Bisharp
dexEntry: This pitiless Pokémon commands a group of Pawniard to hound prey into immobility. It then moves in to finish the prey off.

name: Bouffalant
dexEntry: They are known to charge so wildly that if a train were to enter their territory, they would send it flying.

name: Rufflet
dexEntry: It stands up to massive opponents, not out of courage, but out of recklessness. But that is how it gets stronger.

name: Braviary
dexEntry: For the sake of its friends, this brave warrior of the sky will not stop battling, even if injured.

name: Vullaby
dexEntry: Their wings are too tiny to allow them to fly. They guard their posteriors with bones that were gathered by Mandibuzz.

name: Mandibuzz
dexEntry: They fly in circles around the sky. When they spot prey, they attack and carry it back to their nest with ease.

name: Heatmor
dexEntry: It draws in air through its tail, transforms it into fire, and uses it like a tongue. It melts Durant and eats them.

name: Durant
dexEntry: Individuals each play different roles in driving Heatmor, their natural predator, away from their colony.

name: Deino
dexEntry: Lacking sight, it's unaware of its surroundings, so it bumps into things and eats anything that moves.

name: Zweilous
dexEntry: The two heads do not get along. Whichever head eats more than the other gets to be the leader.

name: Hydreigon
dexEntry: It responds to movement by attacking. This scary, three-headed Pokémon devours everything in its path!

name: Larvesta
dexEntry: Said to have been born from the sun, it spews fire from its horns and encases itself in a cocoon of fire when it evolves.

name: Volcarona
dexEntry: Thought to be an embodiment of the sun, it appeared during a bitterly cold winter and saved Pokémon from freezing.

name: Cobalion
dexEntry: It has a body and heart of steel. It worked with its allies to punish people when they hurt Pokémon.

name: Terrakion
dexEntry: Spoken of in legend, this Pokémon used its phenomenal power to destroy a castle in its effort to protect Pokémon.

name: Virizion
dexEntry: Legends say this Pokémon confounded opponents with its swift movements.

name: Tornadus
