dexEntry: In every direction it flies, creating winds so powerful, they blow everything away.

name: Thundurus
dexEntry: As it flies around, it shoots lightning all over the place and causes forest fires. It is therefore disliked.

name: Reshiram
dexEntry: This legendary Pokémon can scorch the world with fire. It helps those who want to build a world of truth.

name: Zekrom
dexEntry: This legendary Pokémon can scorch the world with lightning. It assists those who want to build an ideal world.

name: Landorus
dexEntry: From the forces of lightning and wind, it creates energy to give nutrients to the soil and make the land abundant.

name: Kyurem
dexEntry: This legendary ice Pokémon waits for a hero to fill in the missing parts of its body with truth or ideals.

name: Keldeo
dexEntry: When it is resolute, its body fills with power and it becomes swifter. Its jumps are then too fast to follow.

name: Meloetta
dexEntry: The melodies sung by Meloetta have the power to make Pokémon that hear them happy or sad.

name: Genesect
dexEntry: This Pokémon existed 300 million years ago. Team Plasma altered it and attached a cannon to its back.

name: Chespin
dexEntry: Such a thick shell of wood covers its head and back that even a direct hit from a truck wouldn’t faze it.

name: Quilladin
dexEntry: It relies on its sturdy shell to deflect predators’ attacks. It counterattacks with its sharp quills.

name: Chesnaught
dexEntry: When it takes a defensive posture with its fists guarding its face, it could withstand a bomb blast.

name: Fennekin
dexEntry: Eating a twig fills it with energy, and its roomy ears give vent to very hot air.

name: Braixen
dexEntry: With friction from its tail fur, it sets the twig on its tail on fire and launches into battle.

name: Delphox
dexEntry: It gazes into the flame at its branch to achieve a focused state, allowing it to see the future.

name: Froakie
dexEntry: It secretes bubbles from its chest and back. The bubbles reduce the damage it would take when attacked.

name: Frogadier
dexEntry: Its swiftness is unparalleled. It can scale a tower of more than 2,000 feet in a minute’s time.

name: Greninja
dexEntry: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water, that can split metal in two.

name: Bunnelby
dexEntry: They use their large ears to dig burrows. They will dig the whole night through.

name: Diggersby
dexEntry: As powerful as an excavator, its ears can reduce dense bedrock to rubble.

name: Fletchling
dexEntry: When it’s excited, its temperature can double, spiking hormone production in its body.

name: Flechinder
dexEntry: Its speed right after takeoff already puts it in the top speed class of all bird Pokémon.

name: Talonflame
dexEntry: When attacking prey, it can reach speeds of up to 310 mph. It finishes its prey off with a colossal kick.

name: Scatterbug
dexEntry: The powder that covers its body regulates its temperature, so it can live in any region or climate.

name: Spewpa
dexEntry: The beaks of birds can’t begin to scratch its stalwart body. To defend itself, it spews powder.

name: Vivillon
dexEntry: The colorful patterns on this Pokémon’s wings depend on the climate and topography of its habitat.

name: Litleo
dexEntry: The stronger the opponent it faces, the more heat and power flow through its body.

name: Pyroar
dexEntry: The male with the largest mane of fire is the leader of the pride.

name: Flabébé
dexEntry: It draws and controls the hidden power of flowers. The flower it holds is most likely part of its body.

name: Floette
dexEntry: When the flowers of a well-tended flower bed bloom, it appears and celebrates with an elegant dance.

name: Florges
dexEntry: Its life can span several hundred years. It’s said to devote its entire life to protecting gardens.

name: Skiddo
dexEntry: Thought to be one of the first Pokémon to live in harmony with humans, it has a placid disposition.

name: Gogoat
dexEntry: They inhabit mountainous regions. The leader of the herd is decided by a battle of clashing horns.

name: Pancham
dexEntry: It grows up imitating the behavior of Pangoro, which it looks up to as a leader.

name: Pangoro
dexEntry: This Pokémon boasts great physical strength. Many Trainers are also smitten by its lively character.

name: Furfrou
dexEntry: Historically, in the Kalos region, these Pokémon were the designated guardians of the king.

name: Espurr
dexEntry: The organ that emits its intense psychic power is sheltered by its ears to keep power from leaking out.

name: Meowstic
dexEntry: When in danger, it raises its ears and releases enough psychic power to grind a 10-ton truck to dust.

name: Honedge
dexEntry: It is born when a departed spirit inhabits a sword. It attaches to people and drinks their life force.

name: Doublade
dexEntry: The complex attack patterns of its two swords are unstoppable, even for an accomplished opponent.

name: Aegislash
dexEntry: It can detect the innate qualities of leadership. Whoever it recognizes is destined to become king.

name: Spritzee
dexEntry: It emits a scent that delights those who smell it. The fragrance changes depending on what it has eaten.

name: Aromatisse
dexEntry: It devises various scents and emits scents that its enemies dislike in order to gain an edge in battle.

name: Swirlix
dexEntry: Because it eats nothing but sweets, its fur is as sticky sweet as cotton candy.

name: Slurpuff
dexEntry: It can distinguish the faintest of scents. It puts its sense of smell to use by helping pastry chefs.

name: Inkay
dexEntry: It draws prey near with its blinking lights and then wraps them up in its long tentacles.

name: Malamar
dexEntry: It wields the most compelling hypnotic powers of any Pokémon, and it forces others to do anything.

name: Binacle
dexEntry: Two Binacle live together on one rock. When they fight, one of them will move to a different rock.

name: Barbaracle
dexEntry: When they evolve, two Binacle multiply into seven. They fight with the power of seven Binacle.

name: Skrelp
dexEntry: It looks just like rotten kelp. It hides from foes while storing up power for its evolution.

name: Dragalge
dexEntry: Tales are told of ships that wander into seas where Dragalge live, never to return.

name: Clauncher
dexEntry: They knock down flying prey by firing compressed water from their massive claws like shooting a pistol.

name: Clawitzer
dexEntry: Their enormous claws launch cannonballs of water powerful enough to pierce tanker hulls.

name: Helioptile
dexEntry: The frills on either side of its head have cells that generate electricity when exposed to sunlight.

name: Heliolisk
dexEntry: It flares its frill and generates energy. It can generate sufficient electricity to power a skyscraper.

name: Tyrunt
dexEntry: Its immense jaws have enough destructive force to chew up an automobile. It lived 100 million years ago.

name: Tyrantrum
dexEntry: Nothing could stop this Pokémon 100 million years ago, so it behaved like a king.

name: Amaura
dexEntry: This calm Pokémon lived in a cold land where there were no violent predators like Tyrantrum.

name: Aurorus
dexEntry: This usually quiet and kindly Pokémon has a surface temperature of around -240 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Sylveon
dexEntry: It sends a soothing aura from its ribbonlike feelers to calm fights.

name: Hawlucha
dexEntry: Although its body is small, its proficient fighting skills enable it to keep up with big bruisers.

name: Dedenne
dexEntry: Its upper whiskers are sensors that survey its surroundings. Its lower whiskers shoot electricity.

name: Carbink
dexEntry: Born from temperatures and pressures deep underground, it fires beams from the stone in its head.

name: Goomy
dexEntry: It’s covered in a slimy membrane that makes any punches or kicks slide off it harmlessly.

name: Sliggoo
dexEntry: It crawls along sluggishly. The swirly protrusion on its back is filled with its brain and other organs.

name: Goodra
dexEntry: An amazingly friendly Pokémon, but if left to itself, loneliness overcomes it, and it oozes gooey tears.

name: Klefki
dexEntry: These key collectors threaten any attackers by fiercely jingling their keys at them.

name: Phantump
dexEntry: It is created when a spirit possesses rotten tree stumps. It prefers to live in abandoned forests.

name: Trevenant
dexEntry: It can control trees at will. It will trap people who harm the forest, so they can never leave.

name: Pumpkaboo
dexEntry: It is said to carry wandering spirits to the place where they belong so they can move on.

name: Gourgeist
dexEntry: It enwraps its prey in its hairlike arms. It sings joyfully as it observes the suffering of its prey.

name: Bergmite
dexEntry: It blocks opponents’ attacks with the ice that shields its body. It uses cold air to repair any crack.

name: Avalugg
dexEntry: The way several Bergmite huddle on its back make it look like an aircraft carrier made of ice.

name: Noibat
dexEntry: They live in pitch black caves. Their enormous ears can emit ultrasonic waves of 200,000 hertz.

name: Noivern
dexEntry: This hot-blooded Pokémon attacks anything it sees with ultrasonic waves that can crush boulders.

name: Xerneas
dexEntry: When the horns on its head shine in seven different colors, it is said to be sharing everlasting life.

name: Yveltal
dexEntry: When its life comes to an end, it absorbs the life energy of every living thing and turns into a cocoon.

name: Zygarde
dexEntry: When the Kalos region’s ecosystem falls into disarray, it appears and reveals its secret power.

name: Diancie
dexEntry: It can instantly create many diamonds by compressing the carbon in the air between its hands.

name: Hoopa
dexEntry: It gathers things it likes and passes them through its loop to teleport them to a secret place.

name: Volcanion
dexEntry: It expels its internal steam from the arms on its back. It has enough power to blow away a mountain.

name: Rowlet
dexEntry: It feels relaxed in tight, dark places and has been known to use its Trainer’s pocket or bag as a nest.

name: Dartrix
dexEntry: It throws sharp feathers called blade quills at enemies or prey. It seldom misses.

name: Decidueye
dexEntry: Although basically cool and cautious, when it’s caught by surprise, it’s seized by panic.

name: Litten
dexEntry: It doesn’t allow its emotions to be easily seen. Earning its trust takes time. It prefers solitude.

name: Torracat
dexEntry: It boasts powerful front legs. With a single punch, it can bend an iron bar right over.

name: Incineroar
dexEntry: When its fighting spirit is set alight, the flames around its waist become especially intense.

name: Popplio
dexEntry: The balloons it inflates with its nose grow larger and larger as it practices day by day.

name: Brionne
dexEntry: It attacks by smacking its enemies with the exploding water balloons that it creates.

name: Primarina
dexEntry: To Primarina, every battle is a stage. It takes down its prey with beautiful singing and dancing.

name: Pikipek
dexEntry: It may look spindly, but its neck muscles are heavy-duty. It can peck at a tree 16 times per second!

name: Trumbeak
dexEntry: It can bend the tip of its beak to produce over a hundred different cries at will.

name: Toucannon
dexEntry: Known for forming harmonious couples, it is brought to wedding ceremonies as a good luck charm.

name: Yungoos
dexEntry: It prefers to eat fresh living things so it marches down streets in search of prey.

name: Gumshoos
dexEntry: Patient by nature, it loses control of itself and pounces when it spots its favorite meal-Rattata!

name: Grubbin
dexEntry: Its strong jaw enables it to scrape trees and slurp out the sap. It normally lives underground.

name: Charjabug
dexEntry: From the food it digests, it generates electricity, and it stores this energy in its electric sac.

name: Vikavolt
dexEntry: It flusters opponents with acrobatic flying maneuvers. This creates an opening for it to attack.

name: Crabrawler
dexEntry: Its hard pincers are well suited to both offense and defense.

name: Crabomnabl
dexEntry: It stores coldness in its pincers and pummels its foes. It can even smash thick walls of ice to bits!

name: Oricorio
dexEntry: This Oricorio has sipped red nectar. Its passionate dance moves cause its enemies to combust in both body and mind.

name: Cutiefly
dexEntry: Myriads of Cutiefly flutter above the heads of people who have auras resembling those of flowers.

name: Ribombee
dexEntry: Some of Ribombee’s pollen puffs are highly nutritious. They are sometimes sold as supplements.

name: Rockruff
dexEntry: When it rubs the rocks on its neck against you, that’s proof of its love for you.

name: Lycanroc
dexEntry: Well equipped with claws and fangs, it uses the sharp rocks in its mane as weapons.

name: Wishiwashi
dexEntry: They’re weak, so they move in schools. However, they can also often be seen all alone, having strayed from the school.

name: Mareanie
dexEntry: Aside from its head, its body parts regenerate quickly if they’re cut off.

name: Toxapex
dexEntry: It crawls along the ocean floor on its 12 legs. It leaves a trail of Corsola bits scattered in its wake.

name: Mudbray
dexEntry: The mud stuck to Mudbray’s hooves enhances its grip and its powerful running gait.

name: Mudsdale
dexEntry: It can trudge mountain roads without rest for three days, all the while dragging a 10-ton load.

name: Dewpider
dexEntry: It crawls onto the land in search of food. Its water bubble allows it to breathe and protects its head.

name: Araquanid
dexEntry: It delivers headbutts with the bubble on its head. Small Pokémon get sucked into it, where they drown.

name: Fomantis
dexEntry: It loves the sunshine. When it basks in the sunlight regularly, it grows up with vivid coloration.

name: Lurantis
dexEntry: For self-protection, it pretends to be a bug Pokémon. Both of its arms bear keen-edged petals.

name: Morelull
dexEntry: It scatters spores that flicker and glow. Anyone seeing these lights falls into a deep slumber.

name: Shiinotic
dexEntry: When it starts fighting for territory with Parasect, the entire area gets completely coated in spores!

name: Salandit
dexEntry: It burns its bodily fluids to create a poisonous gas. It weakens enemies and sends them reeling with it.

name: Salazzle
dexEntry: It punishes Salandit that couldn’t bring it food with a fierce slap of its flame-spewing palm.

name: Stufful
dexEntry: Stufful hates to be hugged or touched in any way. It will squirm, thrash, and resist with amazing power.

name: Bewear
dexEntry: It boasts tremendous physical strength. Many people call it the most dangerous Pokémon in Alola region.

name: Bounsweet
dexEntry: Because of its sweet, delicious aroma, bird Pokémon are always after it.

name: Steenee
dexEntry: It bounces around, swinging the sepals on its head with abandon. It’s quite painful when it smacks you!

name: Tsareena
dexEntry: A master of grand and beautiful kicks, it can knock out even kickboxing champions with a single blow.

name: Comfey
dexEntry: Baths prepared with the flowers from its vine have a relaxing effect so it is a hit to many people.

name: Oranguru
dexEntry: Known for its extreme intelligence, it will look down on inexperienced Trainers.

name: Passimian
dexEntry: They form groups of 20 individuals. Their mutual bond is remarkable-they will never let down a comrade.

name: Wimpod
dexEntry: An astonishingly coward Pokémon, it whirs its legs at high speed to run away if anything comes near it.

name: Golisopod
dexEntry: With a flashing slash of its giant sharp claws, it cleaves seawater-or even air-right in two.

name: Sandygast
dexEntry: Born from a sand mound playfully built by a child, this Pokémon embodies the grudges of the departed.

name: Palossand
dexEntry: Buried beneath the castle are masses of dried-up bones from those whose vitality it has drained.

name: Pyukumuku
dexEntry: Its body is covered with slime. If you accidentally step on it, you’ll slip, and it will get mad at you!

name: Type: Null
dexEntry: There’s danger of its going on a rampage, so its true power is sealed away beneath its control mask.

name: Silvally
dexEntry: It destroyed its own control mask. It has become capable of changing type by equipping special memories.

name: Minior
dexEntry: It eats dust in the atmosphere. The composition of the dust determines the color of its core.

name: Komala
dexEntry: It stays asleep from the moment it’s born. When it falls into a deep sleep, it stops moving altogether.

name: Turtonator
dexEntry: It gushes fire and poisonous gases from its nostrils. Its dung is an explosive substance.

name: Togedemaru
dexEntry: When it’s surprised or agitated, the 14 fur spikes on its back will stand up involuntarily.

name: Mimikyu
dexEntry: It conceals its terrifying appearance beneath an old rag so it can get closer to people and Pokémon.

name: Bruxish
dexEntry: Its skin is thick enough to fend off spikes. With its robust teeth, it crunches up and eats the spikes.

name: Drampa
dexEntry: It appears in towns and plays with the children. Drampa will protect kids when they’re in danger.

name: Dhelmise
dexEntry: It wraps its prey in green seaweed and sucks away their vitality. It only likes to go after big prey.

name: Jangmo-o
dexEntry: They live in mountains where no trace of humans can be detected. It grows as it battles others.

name: Hakamo-o
dexEntry: It leaps at its prey with a courageous shout. Its scaly punches tear its opponents to shreds.

name: Kommo-o
dexEntry: It battles valiantly with its fists, which are armored in steel scales. Kommo-o specializes in uppercuts.

name: Tapu Koko
dexEntry: This guardian deity of Melemele summons thunderclouds and stores their lightning inside its body.

name: Tapu Lele
dexEntry: This guardian deity of Akala is guilelessly cruel. Its flowers’ fragrant aroma is its source of energy.

name: Tapu Bulu
dexEntry: The guardian deity of Ula’ula is a lazy Pokémon. It commands plants to immobilize its foes.

name: Tapu Fini
dexEntry: The guardian deity of Poni can control water. It can create pure water that will wash away any impurity.

name: Cosmog
dexEntry: Its body is gaseous and frail. It slowly grows as it collects dust from the atmosphere.

name: Cosmoem
dexEntry: As it absorbs light, Cosmoem continues to grow. Its golden shell is surprisingly solid.

name: Solgaleo
dexEntry: In writings from the distant past, it’s called by the name ’the beast that devours the sun.’.

name: Lunala
dexEntry: It sometimes summons unknown powers and life-forms to this world from holes that lead to other worlds.

name: Nihilego
dexEntry: A life-form from another world, it was dubbed a UB and is thought to produce a strong neurotoxin.

name: Buzzwole
dexEntry: Buzzwole goes around showing off its abnormally swollen muscles. It is one kind of Ultra Beast.

name: Pheromosa
dexEntry: One of the dangerous Ultra Beasts, it has been spotted running across the land at terrific speeds.

name: Xurkitree
dexEntry: It appeared from the Ultra Wormhole. It raided a power plant, so it energizes itself with electricity.

name: Celesteela
dexEntry: It appeared from the Ultra Wormhole. Witnesses observed it flying across the sky at high speed.

name: Kartana
dexEntry: This Ultra Beast’s body, which is as thin as paper, is like a sharpened sword.

name: Guzzlord
dexEntry: An unknown life-form called a UB. It may be constantly hungry-it is certainly always devouring something.

name: Necrozma
dexEntry: Light is the source of its energy. If it isn’t devouring light, impurities build up in it.

name: Magearna
dexEntry: Its mechanized body is merely a vessel. Its true self is its Soul-Heart, an artificial soul.

name: Marshadow
dexEntry: It lurks in the shadows of others, copying their movements and powers. It is craven and cowering.

name: Poipole
dexEntry: This Ultra Beast is well enough liked to be chosen as a first partner in its own world.

name: Naganadel
dexEntry: It stores hundreds of liters of poisonous liquid in its body. It is one of the organisms known as UBs.

name: Stakataka
dexEntry: When stone walls started moving and attacking, the brute’s true identity was this mysterious life-form.

name: Blacefalon
dexEntry: It causes explosions, then takes advantage of opponents’ surprise to rob them of their vitality.

name: Zeraora
dexEntry: It approaches its enemies at the speed of lightning, then tears them limb from limb with its sharp claws.

name: Meltan
dexEntry: It melts particles of iron and other metals found in the subsoil, so it can absorb theminto its body of molten steel.

name: Melmetal
dexEntry: Revered long ago for its capacity to create iron from nothing, for some reason it has come back to life after 3,000 years.

name: Grookey
dexEntry: It attacks with rapid beats of its stick. As it strikes with amazing speed, it gets more and more pumped.

name: Thwackey
dexEntry: The faster a Thwackey can beat out a rhythm with its two sticks, the more respect it wins from its peers.

name: Rillaboom
dexEntry: By drumming, it taps into the power of its special tree stump. The roots of the stump follow its direction in battle.

name: Scorbunny
dexEntry: It has special pads on the backs of its feet, and one on its nose. Its pads radiate tremendous heat.

name: Raboot
dexEntry: Its thick and fluffy fur protects it from the cold and enables it to use hotter fire moves.

name: Cinderace
dexEntry: It gets pumped up when cheered on. But if it starts showboating, it could put itself in a tough spot.

name: Sobble
dexEntry: When it gets wet, its skin changes color, and this Pokémon becomes invisible as if it were camouflaged.

name: Drizzile
dexEntry: Highly intelligent but also very lazy, it keeps enemies out of its territory by laying traps everywhere.

name: Inteleon
dexEntry: It picks out foes’ weak points so it can precisely blast them with water that shoots from its fingertips.

name: Skwovet
dexEntry: This Pokémon becomes uneasy if its cheeks are ever completely empty of berries.

name: Greedent
dexEntry: This Pokémon has strong teeth and can chew through the toughest of berry shells.

name: Rookidee
dexEntry: It will bravely challenge any foe, no matter how powerful. Even suffering a defeat increases its strength a bit.

name: Corvsquire
dexEntry: The lessons of many harsh battles have taught it how to accurately judge an opponent’s strength.

name: Corviknite
dexEntry: The black luster of its steel body could drive terror into the heart of any foe.

name: Blipbug
dexEntry: A constant collector of information, this Pokémon is very smart. Very strong is what it isn’t.

name: Dottler
dexEntry: As it grows inside its shell, it uses its psychic abilities to monitor its surroundings and wait for evolution.

name: Orbeetle
dexEntry: It’s famous for its high intelligence, and the large size of its brain is proof that it has immense psychic power.

name: Nickit
dexEntry: Aided by the soft pads on its feet, it silently raids the food stores of others. It survives off its ill-gotten gains.

name: Thievul
dexEntry: With a lithe body and sharp claws, it goes around stealing food and eggs. It secretly marks its future targets.

name: Gossifleur
dexEntry: It anchors itself in the ground and basks in the sun. After absorbing enough sunlight, it blooms vividly.

name: Eldegoss
dexEntry: The seeds attached to its cotton fluff are full of nutrients. It spreads them on the wind so that others can benefit.

name: Wooloo
dexEntry: If its fleece grows too long, it won’t be able to move. Cloth made with its wool is surprisingly durable.

name: Dubwool
dexEntry: Its majestic horns are meant only to impress the opposite gender. They never see use in battle.

name: Chewtle
dexEntry: Apparently the itch of its teething impels it to snap its jaws at anything in front of it.

name: Drednaw
dexEntry: With jaws that can shear through steel rods, this highly aggressive Pokémon chomps down on its unfortunate prey.

name: Yamper
dexEntry: This greedy Pokémon only helps people with their work because it wants treats. As it runs, it crackles with electricity.

name: Boltund
dexEntry: It sends electricity through its legs to boost their strength. Running at top speed, it easily breaks 50 mph.

name: Rolycoly
dexEntry: It can race around like a unicycle, even on rough, rocky terrain. Burning coal sustains it.

name: Carkol
dexEntry: By rapidly rolling its legs, it can easily travel at over 18 mph. It forms coal inside its body.

name: Coalossal
dexEntry: While engaged in battle, its mountain of coal will burn bright red, scorching the surrounding area with sparks.

name: Applin
dexEntry: As soon as it’s born, it burrows into an apple. the flavor of the apple is what determines its evolution.

name: Flapple
dexEntry: It ate a sour apple, which induced its evolution. It stores an acid capable of causing chemical burns in its cheeks.

name: Appletun
dexEntry: It ate a sweet apple, which induced its evolution. Back in the day, children used to have it as a snack.

name: Silicobra
dexEntry: It spews sand from its nostrils. While the enemy is blinded, it burrows into the ground to hide.

name: Sandaconda
dexEntry: When it contracts its body, over 220 pounds of sand sprays from its nose. It becomes disheartened if it runs out.

name: Cramorant
dexEntry: This hungry Pokémon swallows Arrokuda whole. Occasionally, it makes a mistake and tries to swallow other Pokémon.

name: Arrokuda
dexEntry: It becomes extremely sluggish after eating its fill. That’s when Cramorant swallows it up.

name: Baraskewda
dexEntry: Its jaw that’s as sharp as a spear and as strong as steel. It spins its tail fins to surge forward at over 100 knots.

name: Toxel
dexEntry: It manipulates the chemical makeup of its poison to produce electricity. Despite a weak voltage, it can cause paralysis.

name: Toxtricity
dexEntry: This short-tempered and aggressive Pokémon chugs stagnant water to absorb any toxins it might contain.

name: Sizzlipede
dexEntry: It stores flammable gas in its body and uses it to generate heat. It then coils around its prey and cooks it.

name: Centskorch
dexEntry: This excessively hostile Pokémon has large and very sharp fangs in addition to its dangerous burning body.

name: Clobbopus
dexEntry: It’s very curious, but its means of investigating things is to try to punch them with its tentacles.

name: Grapploct
dexEntry: Searching for an opponent to test its skills against, it emerges onto land. Once the battle is over, it returns to the sea.

name: Sinistea
dexEntry: This Pokémon is said to have been born when a lonely spirit possessed a cold, leftover cup of tea.

name: Poltegeist
dexEntry: This species lives in antique teapots. Most pots are forgeries, but on rare occasions, an authentic work is found.

name: Hatenna
dexEntry: Via the protrusion on its head, it senses other creatures’ emotions. It prefers areas without people.

name: Hattrem
dexEntry: No matter who you are, if you bring strong emotions near this Pokémon, it will silence you violently.

name: Hatterene
dexEntry: Known as the Forest Witch, if you are too loud around it, you risk being torn apart by the claws on its tentacle.

name: Impidimp
dexEntry: It sneaks into people’s homes, taking and feasting on the negative energy of the frustrated occupants.

name: Morgrem
dexEntry: With sly cunning, it lures people into the woods. Some believe it to have the power to make crops grow.

name: Grimmsnarl
dexEntry: Its hairs work like muscle fibers. When its hairs unfurl, they latch on to foes, ensnaring them like tentacles.

name: Obstagoon
dexEntry: It evolved after experiencing numerous fights. While crossing its arms, it lets out a shout that would make anyone flinch.

name: Perrserker
dexEntry: What appears to be an iron helmet is actually hardened hair. This Pokémon lives for the thrill of battle.

name: Cursola
dexEntry: Be cautious of the ectoplasmic body surrounding its soul. You’ll become stiff as stone if you touch it.

name: Sirfetch’d
dexEntry: After deflecting attacks with its hard leaf shield, it strikes back with its sharp leek stalk.

name: Mr. Rime
dexEntry: Its amusing movements make it very popular. It releases its psychic power from the pattern on its belly.

name: Runerigus
dexEntry: Never touch its shadowlike body, or you’ll be shown the horrific memories behind the picture carved into it.

name: Milcery
dexEntry: They say that any patisserie visited by Milcery is guaranteed success and good fortune.

name: Alcremie
dexEntry: It evolved from a Milcery that held onto a Strawberry Sweet. Its flavor depends on how it was mixed.

name: Falinks
dexEntry: The six of them work together as one. Teamwork is also their battle strategy, and they constantly change their formation.

name: Pincurchin
dexEntry: It feeds on seaweed, using its teeth to scrape it off rocks. Electric current flows from the tips of its spines.

name: Snom
dexEntry: It eats snow that piles up on the ground. The more snow it eats, the bigger its spikes grow.

name: Frosmoth
dexEntry: Icy scales fall from its wings like snow as it flies over fields and mountains.

name: Stonjorner
dexEntry: Once a year, on a specific date and at a specific time, they gather out of nowhere and form up in a circle.

name: Eiscue
dexEntry: It drifted in on the flow of ocean waters from a frigid place. It keeps its head iced constantly to stay cold.

name: Indeedee
dexEntry: Through its horns, it can pick up on the emotions of creatures around it. Males will act as valets for those they serve.

name: Morpeko
dexEntry: As it eats the seeds stored up in its pouches, it generates electricity while satisfying its constant hunger.

name: Cufant
dexEntry: If a job requires serious strength, Cufant will excel at it. Its copper body tarnishes in the rain, turning green.

name: Copperajah
dexEntry: These Pokémon live in herds. Their trunks have incredible grip strength, strong enough to crush giant rocks.

name: Dracozolt
dexEntry: The powerful muscles in its tail generate its electricity. Its upper half is entirely too small.

name: Arctozolt
dexEntry: The shaking of its freezing upper half is what generates its electricity. It has a hard time walking around.

name: Dracovish
dexEntry: Its mighty legs are capable of running at speeds exceeding 40 mph, but it can’t breathe unless it’s underwater.

name: Arctovish
dexEntry: The skin on its face is impervious to attack, but breathing difficulties made it go extinct anyway.

name: Duraludon
dexEntry: Its body resembles polished metal, and it’s both lightweight and strong. However, its body rusts easily.

name: Dreepy
dexEntry: After being reborn as a ghost, Dreepy wanders the areas it used to inhabit back when it was alive in prehistoric seas.

name: Drakloak
dexEntry: It’s capable of flying faster than 120 mph. It battles alongside Dreepy and dotes on them until they evolve.

name: Dragapult
dexEntry: Apparently the Dreepy inside its horns eagerly look forward to being launched out at Mach speeds.

name: Zacian
dexEntry: It  has slumbered for many years. Some say it is Zamazenta’s elder sister, others say the two are rivals.

name: Zamazenta
dexEntry: It slept for aeons while in the form of a statue. It was asleep for so long, people forgot that it ever existed.

name: Eternatus
dexEntry: It was inside a meteorite that fell 20,000 years ago. The energy that its core absorbs allows it to live.

name: Kubfu
dexEntry: If it pulls the long white hair on its head, its fighting spirit heightens and power wells up from deep in its belly.

name: Urshifu
dexEntry: Inhabiting the mountains of a distant region, it races across sheer cliffs, training its legs and refining its moves.

name: Zarude
dexEntry: Once the vines on its body tear off, they become nutrients in the soil. This helps the plants of the forest grow.

name: Regieleki
dexEntry: Its entire body is made of an organ that generates electricity. It is capable of generating a region’s worth of electricity.

name: Regidrago
dexEntry: Its body is composed of crystallized dragon energy. It is said to contain the power of every Dragon Pokémon.

name: Glastrier
dexEntry: Glastrier has tremendous physical strength. The mask covering its face is 100 times stronger than diamond.

name: Spectrier
dexEntry: As it dashes through the night, it absorbs the life energy of sleeping Pokémon. It craves silence and solitude.

name: Calyrex
dexEntry: Its every move is filled with grace and dignity. Extremely intelligent, it is said to see past, present, and future events.

name: Wyrdeer
dexEntry: The fur shed from its beard retains heat well and is a highly useful material for winter clothing.

name: Kleavor
dexEntry: Parts of its body turned to stone when it evolved thanks to an extremely rare ore found in volcanic areas.

name: Ursaluna
dexEntry: I believe it was Hisui's swampy terrain that gave Ursaluna its burly physique and newfound capacity to manipulate peat at will.

name: Basclegion
dexEntry: This Pokémon is cloaked in the souls of its comrades who perished during a punishing journey to the river of their birth.

name: Sneasler
dexEntry: Because of Sneasler's virulent poison and daunting physical prowess, no other species could hope to best it on the frozen highlands.

name: Overqwil
dexEntry: Overqwil’s poisonous spikes will reflexively react even while Overqwil sleeps, stabbing any moving thing that approaches.

name: Enamorus
dexEntry: When it flies to this land from across the sea, the bitter winter comes to an end. According to legend, this Pokémon's love gives rise to the budding of fresh life across Hisui.

name: Sprigatito
dexEntry: The sweet scent its body gives off mesmerizes those around it. The scent grows stronger when this Pokémon is in the sun.

name: Floragato
dexEntry: Floragato deftly wields the vine hidden beneath its long fur, slamming the hard flower bud against its opponents.

name: Mewscarada
dexEntry: With skillful misdirection, it rigs foes with pollen-packed flower bombs, and sets them off before its foes realize what’s going on.

name: Fuecoco
dexEntry: It lies on warm rocks and uses the heat absorbed by its square-shaped scales to create fire energy.

name: Crocalor
dexEntry: The combination of Crocalor’s fire energy and overflowing vitality has caused an egg-shaped fireball to appear on its head.

name: Skeledirge
dexEntry: Skeledirge’s gentle singing soothes the souls of all that hear it. It burns its enemies to a crisp with flames of over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Quaxly
dexEntry: Its strong legs let it easily swim around in even fast-flowing rivers. It likes to keep things tidy and is prone to overthinking.

name: Quaxwell
dexEntry: The hardworking Quaxwell observes people and Pokémon from various regions and incorporates their movements into its own dance routines.

name: Quaquaval
dexEntry: Dancing in ways that evoke far-away places, this Pokémon mesmerizes all that see it. Flourishes of its decorative water feathers slice into its foes.

name: Lechonk
dexEntry: This Pokémon spurns all but the finest of foods. Its body gives off an herblike scent that bug Pokémon detest.

name: Oinkologne
dexEntry: Oinkologne is proud of its fine, glossy skin. It emits a concentrated scent from the tip of its tail.

name: Tarountula
dexEntry: The ball of threads wrapped around its body is elastic enough to deflect the scythes of Scyther, this Pokémon’s natural enemy.

name: Spidops
dexEntry: It clings to branches and ceilings using its threads and moves without a sound. It takes out its prey before the prey even notices it.

name: Nymble
dexEntry: It has its third set of legs folded up. When it’s in a tough spot, this Pokémon jumps over 30 feet using the strength of its legs.

name: Lokix
dexEntry: It uses its normally folded third set of legs when in Showdown Mode. This places a huge burden on its body, so it can’t stay in this mode for long.

name: Pawmi
dexEntry: The pads of its paws are electricity-discharging organs. Pawmi fires electricity from its forepaws while standing unsteadily on its hind legs.

name: Pawmo
dexEntry: Pawmo uses a unique fighting technique in which it uses its forepaws to strike foes and zap them with electricity from its paw pads simultaneously.

name: Pawmot
dexEntry: Pawmot's fluffy fur acts as a battery. It can store the same amount of electricity as an electric car.

name: Tandemaus
dexEntry: The pair sticks together no matter what. They split any food they find exactly in half and then eat it together.

name: Maushold
dexEntry: The two little ones just appeared one day. The group might be a family of related Pokémon, but nobody knows for sure.

name: Fidough
dexEntry: The yeast in Fidough's breath is useful for cooking, so this Pokémon has been protected by people since long ago.

name: Dachsbun
dexEntry: The surface of this Pokémon's skin hardens when exposed to intense heat, and its body has an appetizing aroma.

name: Smoliv
dexEntry: This Pokémon converts nutrients into oil, which it stores in the fruit on its head. It can easily go a whole week without eating or drinking.

name: Dolliv
dexEntry: Dolliv shares its tasty, fresh-scented oil with others. This species has coexisted with humans since times long gone.

name: Arboliva
dexEntry: This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon.

name: Squawkbily
dexEntry: These Pokémon prefer to live in cities. They form flocks based on the color of their feathers, and they fight over territory.

name: Nacli
dexEntry: The ground scrapes its body as it travels, causing it to leave salt behind. Salt is constantly being created and replenished inside Nacli’s body.

name: Naclstack
dexEntry: It compresses rock salt inside its body and shoots out hardened salt pellets with enough force to perforate an iron sheet.

name: Garganacl
dexEntry: Garganacl will rub its fingertips together and sprinkle injured Pokémon with salt. Even severe wounds will promptly heal afterward.

name: Charcadet
dexEntry: Its firepower increases when it fights, reaching over 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit. It likes berries that are rich in fat.

name: Armarouge
dexEntry: Armarouge evolved through the use of a set of armor that belonged to a distinguished warrior. This Pokémon is incredibly loyal.

name: Ceruledge
dexEntry: An old set of armor steeped in grudges caused this Pokémon's evolution. Ceruledge cuts its enemies to pieces without mercy.

name: Tadbulb
dexEntry: Tadbulb shakes its tail to generate electricity. If it senses danger, it will make its head blink on and off to alert its allies.

name: Bellibolt
dexEntry: What appear to be eyeballs are actually organs for discharging the electricity generated by Bellibolt's belly-button dynamo.

name: Wattrel
dexEntry: These Pokémon make their nests on coastal cliffs. The nests have a strange, crackling texture, and they're a popular delicacy.

name: Kilowatrel
dexEntry: Kilowattrel inflates its throat sac to amplify its electricity. By riding the wind, this Pokémon can fly over 430 miles in a day.

name: Maschiff
dexEntry: Its well-developed jaw and fangs are strong enough to crunch through boulders, and its thick fat makes for an excellent defense.

name: Mabosstiff
dexEntry: This Pokémon can store energy in its large dewlap. Mabosstiff unleashes this energy all at once to blow away enemies.

name: Shroodle
dexEntry: To keep enemies away from its territory, it paints markings around its nest using a poisonous liquid that has an acrid odor.

name: Grafaiai
dexEntry: Each Grafaiai paints its own individual pattern, and it will paint that same pattern over and over again throughout its life.

name: Bramblin
dexEntry: Not even Bramblin knows where it is headed as it tumbles across the wilderness, blown by the wind. It loathes getting wet.

name: Bramblgast
dexEntry: Brambleghast wanders around arid regions. On rare occasions, mass outbreaks of these Pokémon will bury an entire town.

name: Toedscool
dexEntry: Though it looks like Tentacool, Toedscool is a completely different species. Its legs may be thin, but it can run at a speed of 30 mph.

name: Toedscruel
dexEntry: These Pokémon gather into groups and form colonies deep within forests. They absolutely hate it when strangers approach.

name: Klawf
dexEntry: This Pokémon lives on sheer cliffs. It sidesteps opponents' attacks, then lunges for their weak spots with its claws.

name: Capsakid
dexEntry: The more sunlight this Pokémon bathes in, the more spicy chemicals are produced by its body, and thus the spicier its moves become.

name: Scovillain
dexEntry: The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame.

name: Rellor
dexEntry: It rolls its mud ball around while the energy it needs for evolution matures. Eventually the time comes for it to evolve.

name: Rabsca
dexEntry: The body that supports the ball barely moves. Therefore, it is thought that the true body of this Pokémon is actually inside the ball.

name: Flittle
dexEntry: It spends its time running around wastelands. If anyone steals its beloved berries, it will chase them down and exact its revenge.

name: Espathra
dexEntry: It emits psychic power from the gaps between its multicolored frills and sprints at speeds greater than 120 mph.

name: Tinkatink
dexEntry: It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokémon that eat metal.

name: Tinkatuff
dexEntry: These Pokémon make their homes in piles of scrap metal. They test the strength of each other's hammers by smashing them together.

name: Tinkaton
dexEntry: This intelligent Pokémon has a very daring disposition. It knocks rocks into the sky with its hammer, aiming for flying Corviknight.

name: Wiglett
dexEntry: This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand.

name: Wugtrio
dexEntry: A variety of fish Pokémon, Wugtrio was once considered to be a regional form of Dugtrio.

name: Bombirdier
dexEntry: Bombirdier uses the apron on its chest to bundle up food, which it carries back to its nest. It enjoys dropping things that make loud noises.

name: Finizen
dexEntry: Its water ring is made from seawater mixed with a sticky fluid that Finizen secretes from its blowhole.

name: Palafin
dexEntry: Its physical capabilities are no different than a Finizen's, but when its allies are in danger, it transforms and powers itself up.

name: Varoom
dexEntry: The steel section is Varoom’s actual body. This Pokémon clings to rocks and converts the minerals within into energy to fuel its activities.

name: Revavroom
dexEntry: It creates a gas out of poison and minerals from rocks. It then detonates the gas in its eight cylinders to generate energy.

name: Cyclizar
dexEntry: It can sprint at over 70 mph while carrying a human. The rider's body heat warms Cyclizar's back and lifts the Pokémon's spirit.

name: Orthworm
dexEntry: When attacked, this Pokémon will wield the tendrils on its body like fists and pelt the opponent with a storm of punches.

name: Glimmet
dexEntry: It absorbs nutrients from cave walls. The petals it wears are made of crystallized poison.

name: Glimmora
dexEntry: When this Pokémon detects danger, it will open up its crystalline petals and fire beams from its conical body.

name: Greavard
dexEntry: It is said that a dog Pokémon that died in the wild without ever interacting with a human was reborn as this Pokémon.

name: Houndstone
dexEntry: Houndstone spends most of its time sleeping in graveyards. Among all the dog Pokémon, this one is most loyal to its master.

name: Flamigo
dexEntry: This Pokémon apparently ties the base of its neck into a knot so that the energy stored in its belly does not escape from its beak.

name: Cetoddle
dexEntry: It lives in frigid regions in pods of five or so individuals. It loves the minerals found in snow and ice.

name: Cetitan
dexEntry: Ice energy builds up in the horn on its upper jaw, causing the horn to reach cryogenic temperatures that freeze its surroundings.

name: Veluza
dexEntry: Veluza has excellent regenerative capabilities. It sheds spare flesh from its body to boost its agility, then charges at its prey.

name: Dondozo
dexEntry: This Pokémon is a glutton, but it's bad at getting food. It teams up with a Tatsugiri to catch prey.

name: Tatsugiri
dexEntry: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.

name: Annihilape
dexEntry: When its anger rose beyond a critical point, this Pokémon gained power that is unfettered by the limits of its physical body.

name: Clodsire
dexEntry: It lives at the bottom of ponds and swamps. It will carry Wooper on its back and ferry them across water from shore to shore.

name: Farigiraf
dexEntry: The hardened head from the tail protects the head of the main body as Farigiraf whips its long neck around to headbutt enemies.

name: Dudunspars
dexEntry: It drives enemies out of its nest by sucking in enough air to fill its long, narrow lungs, then releasing the air in an intense blast.

name: Kingambit
dexEntry: Only a Bisharp that stands above all others in its vast army can evolve into Kingambit.

name: Great Tusk
dexEntry: This creature resembles a mysterious Pokémon that, according to a paranormal magazine, has lived since ancient times.

name: ScreamTail
dexEntry: It resembles a mysterious Pokémon described in a paranormal magazine as a Jigglypuff from one billion years ago.

name: BruteBonet
dexEntry: It bears a slight resemblance to a Pokémon described in a dubious magazine as a cross between a dinosaur and a mushroom.

name: FluttrMane
dexEntry: It has similar features to a ghostly pterosaur that was covered in a paranormal magazine, but the two have little else in common.

name: SlithrWing
dexEntry: This Pokémon somewhat resembles an ancient form of Volcarona that was introduced in a dubious magazine.

name: SandyShock
dexEntry: It slightly resembles a Magneton that lived for 10,000 years and was featured in an article in a paranormal magazine.

name: IronTreads
dexEntry: This Pokémon closely resembles a scientific weapon that a paranormal magazine claimed was sent to this planet by aliens.

name: IronBundle
dexEntry: Its shape is similar to a robot featured in a paranormal magazine. The robot was said to have been created by an ancient civilization.

name: Iron Hands
dexEntry: It is very similar to a cyborg covered by a paranormal magazine. The cyborg was said to be the modified form of a certain athlete.

name: Iron Neck
dexEntry: It's possible that Iron Jugulis, an object described in an old book, may actually be this Pokémon.

name: Iron Moth
dexEntry: This Pokémon resembles an unknown object described in a paranormal magazine as a UFO sent to observe humanity.

name: IronThorns
dexEntry: It has some similarities to a Pokémon introduced in a dubious magazine as a Tyranitar from 1 billion years in the future.

name: Frigibax
dexEntry: This Pokémon lives in forests and crags. Using the power of its dorsal fin, it cools the inside of its nest like a refrigerator.

name: Arctibax
dexEntry: Arctibax freezes the air around it, protecting its face with an ice mask and turning its dorsal fin into a blade of ice.

name: Baxcalibur
dexEntry: This Pokémon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava.

name: Gimmighoul
dexEntry: It lives inside an old treasure chest. Sometimes it gets left in shop corners since no one realizes it’s actually a Pokémon.

name: Gholdengo
dexEntry: Its body seems to be made up of 1,000 coins. This Pokémon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends with anybody.

name: Wo-Chien
dexEntry: It drains the life-force from vegetation, causing nearby forests to instantly wither and fields to turn barren.

name: Chien-Pao
dexEntry: This Pokémon can control 100 tons of fallen snow. It plays around innocently by leaping in and out of avalanches it has caused.

name: Ting-Lu
dexEntry: The fear poured into an ancient ritual vessel has clad itself in rocks and dirt to become a Pokémon.

name: Chi-Yu
dexEntry: The envy accumulated within curved beads that sparked multiple conflicts has clad itself in fire and become a Pokémon.

name: RoarinMoon
dexEntry: According to a dubious magazine, this Pokémon has some connection to a phenomenon that occurs in a certain region.

name: Iron Valor
dexEntry: It has some similarities to a mad scientist’s invention covered in a paranormal magazine.

name: Koraidon
dexEntry: This Pokémon resembles Cyclizar, but it is far burlier and more ferocious. Nothing is known about its ecology or other features.

name: Miraidon
dexEntry: Much remains unknown about this creature. It resembles Cyclizar, but it is far more ruthless and powerful.

name: WalkngWake
dexEntry: It resembles an illustration published in a paranormal magazine, said to be a depiction of a super-ancient Suicune.

name: IronLeaves
dexEntry: Many of its physical characteristics match those of a Virizion from the future that was covered in a paranormal magazine.

name: Dipplin
dexEntry: Dipplin is two creatures in one Pokémon. Its evolution was triggered by a special apple grown only in one place.

name: Polchgeist
dexEntry: Poltchageist looks like a regional form of Sinistea, but it was recently discovered that the two Pokémon are entirely unrelated.

name: Sinistcha
dexEntry: It pretends to be tea, trying to fool people into drinking it so it can drain their life- force. Its ruse is generally unsuccessful.

name: Okidogi
dexEntry: Okidogi is a ruffian with a short temper. It can pulverize anything by swinging around the chain on its neck.

name: Munkidori
dexEntry: Munkidori keeps itself somewhere safe while it toys with its foes, using psychokinesis to induce intense dizziness.

name: Fezanditi
dexEntry: Fezandipiti beats its glossy wings to scatter pheromones that captivate people and Pokémon.

name: Ogerpon
dexEntry: This mischief-loving Pokémon is full of curiosity. It battles by drawing out the type- based energy contained within its masks.

name: Archaludon
dexEntry: It digs holes on mountains, searching for food. It’s so durable that being caught in a cave-in won’t faze it.

name: Hydrapple
dexEntry: These capricious syrpents have banded together. On the rare occasion that their moods align, their true power is unleashed.

name: GouginFire
dexEntry: It resembles a Pokémon once shown in a paranormal magazine. That Pokémon was said to be an Entei regenerated from a fossil.

name: RagingBolt
dexEntry: It bears resemblance to a Pokémon that became a hot topic for a short while after being touted it as Raikou's ancestor.

name: IronBolder
dexEntry: It resembles a Pokémon described in a dubious magazine as a Terrakion that had been modified by an evil organization.

name: Iron Crown
dexEntry: It resembles a mysterious object introduced in a paranormal magazine as a cutting-edge weapon shaped like a Cobalion.

name: Terapagos
dexEntry: It’s thought that this Pokémon lived in ancient Paldea until it got caught in seismic shifts and went extinct.

name: Pecharunt
dexEntry: Its peach-shaped shell serves as storage for a potent poison. It makes poisonous mochi and serves it to people and Pokémon.
